5149 size_t num_frames = thread_sp->GetStackFrameCount();
5150 item.Resize(num_frames, *m_frame_delegate_sp, false);
5151 for (size_t i = 0; i < num_frames; ++i) {
5152 item[i].SetUserData(thread_sp.get());
5153 item[i].SetIdentifier(i);
5154 }
5155 }
5156 return;
5157 }
5158 }
5159 item.ClearChildren();
5160 }
5161
5162 bool TreeDelegateItemSelected(TreeItem &item) override {
5163 ProcessSP process_sp = GetProcess();
5164 if (process_sp && process_sp->IsAlive()) {
5165 StateType state = process_sp->GetState();
5166 if (StateIsStoppedState(state, true)) {
5167 ThreadSP thread_sp = GetThread(item);
5168 if (thread_sp) {
5169 ThreadList &thread_list = thread_sp->GetProcess()->GetThreadList();
5170 std::lock_guard<std::recursive_mutex> guard(thread_list.GetMutex());
5171 ThreadSP selected_thread_sp = thread_list.GetSelectedThread();
5172 if (selected_thread_sp->GetID() != thread_sp->GetID()) {
5173 thread_list.SetSelectedThreadByID(thread_sp->GetID());
5174 return true;
5175 }
5176 }
5177 }
5178 }
5179 return false;
5180 }
5181
5182protected:
5183 Debugger &m_debugger;
5184 std::shared_ptr<FrameTreeDelegate> m_frame_delegate_sp;
5185 lldb::user_id_t m_tid = LLDB_INVALID_THREAD_ID;
5186 uint32_t m_stop_id = UINT32_MAX;
5187 FormatEntity::Entry m_format;
5188};
5189
5190class ThreadsTreeDelegate : public TreeDelegate {
5191public:
5192 ThreadsTreeDelegate(Debugger &debugger)
5193 : TreeDelegate(), m_thread_delegate_sp(), m_debugger(debugger) {
5194 FormatEntity::Parse("process ${process.id}{, name = ${process.name}}",
5195 m_format);
5196 }
5197
5198 ~ThreadsTreeDelegate() override = default;
5199
5200 ProcessSP GetProcess() {
5201 return m_debugger.GetCommandInterpreter()
5202 .GetExecutionContext()
5203 .GetProcessSP();
5204 }
5205
5206 bool TreeDelegateShouldDraw() override {
5207 ProcessSP process = GetProcess();
5208 if (!process)
5209 return false;
5210
5211 if (StateIsRunningState(process->GetState()))
5212 return false;
5213
5214 return true;
5215 }
5216
5217 void TreeDelegateDrawTreeItem(TreeItem &item, Window &window) override {
5218 ProcessSP process_sp = GetProcess();
5219 if (process_sp && process_sp->IsAlive()) {
5220 StreamString strm;
5221 ExecutionContext exe_ctx(process_sp);
5222 if (FormatEntity::Formatter(nullptr, &exe_ctx, nullptr, false, false)
5223 .Format(m_format, strm)) {
5224 int right_pad = 1;
5225 window.PutCStringTruncated(right_pad, strm.GetString().str().c_str());
5226 }
5227 }
5228 }
5229
5230 void TreeDelegateGenerateChildren(TreeItem &item) override {
5231 ProcessSP process_sp = GetProcess();
5232 m_update_selection = false;
5233 if (process_sp && process_sp->IsAlive()) {
5234 StateType state = process_sp->GetState();
5235 if (StateIsStoppedState(state, true)) {
5236 const uint32_t stop_id = process_sp->GetStopID();
5237 if (m_stop_id == stop_id)
5238 return; // Children are already up to date
5239
5240 m_stop_id = stop_id;
5241 m_update_selection = true;
5242
5243 if (!m_thread_delegate_sp) {
5244 // Always expand the thread item the first time we show it
5245 // item.Expand();
5246 m_thread_delegate_sp =
5247 std::make_shared<ThreadTreeDelegate>(m_debugger);
5248 }
5249
5250 ThreadList &threads = process_sp->GetThreadList();
5251 std::lock_guard<std::recursive_mutex> guard(threads.GetMutex());
5252 ThreadSP selected_thread = threads.GetSelectedThread();
5253 size_t num_threads = threads.GetSize();
5254 item.Resize(num_threads, *m_thread_delegate_sp, false);
5255 for (size_t i = 0; i < num_threads; ++i) {
5256 ThreadSP thread = threads.GetThreadAtIndex(i);
5257 item[i].SetIdentifier(thread->GetID());
5258 item[i].SetMightHaveChildren(true);
5259 if (selected_thread->GetID() == thread->GetID())
5260 item[i].Expand();
5261 }
5262 return;
5263 }
5264 }
5265 item.ClearChildren();
5266 }
5267
5268 void TreeDelegateUpdateSelection(TreeItem &root, int &selection_index,
5269 TreeItem *&selected_item) override {
5270 if (!m_update_selection)
5271 return;
5272
5273 ProcessSP process_sp = GetProcess();
5274 if (!(process_sp && process_sp->IsAlive()))
5275 return;
5276
5277 StateType state = process_sp->GetState();
5278 if (!StateIsStoppedState(state, true))
5279 return;
5280
5281 ThreadList &threads = process_sp->GetThreadList();
5282 std::lock_guard<std::recursive_mutex> guard(threads.GetMutex());
5283 ThreadSP selected_thread = threads.GetSelectedThread();
5284 size_t num_threads = threads.GetSize();
5285 for (size_t i = 0; i < num_threads; ++i) {
5286 ThreadSP thread = threads.GetThreadAtIndex(i);
5287 if (selected_thread->GetID() == thread->GetID()) {
5288 selected_item =
5289 &root[i][thread->GetSelectedFrameIndex(SelectMostRelevantFrame)];
5290 selection_index = selected_item->GetRowIndex();
5291 return;
5292 }
5293 }
5294 }
5295
5296 bool TreeDelegateItemSelected(TreeItem &item) override { return false; }
5297
5298 bool TreeDelegateExpandRootByDefault() override { return true; }
5299
5300protected:
5301 std::shared_ptr<ThreadTreeDelegate> m_thread_delegate_sp;
5302 Debugger &m_debugger;
5303 uint32_t m_stop_id = UINT32_MAX;
5304 bool m_update_selection = false;
5305 FormatEntity::Entry m_format;
5306};
5307
5308class BreakpointLocationTreeDelegate : public TreeDelegate {
5309public:
5310 BreakpointLocationTreeDelegate(Debugger &debugger)
5311 : TreeDelegate(), m_debugger(debugger) {}
5312
5313 ~BreakpointLocationTreeDelegate() override = default;
5314
5315 Process *GetProcess() {
5316 ExecutionContext exe_ctx(
5317 m_debugger.GetCommandInterpreter().GetExecutionContext());
5318 return exe_ctx.GetProcessPtr();
5319 }
5320
5321 BreakpointLocationSP GetBreakpointLocation(const TreeItem &item) {
5322 Breakpoint *breakpoint = (Breakpoint *)item.GetUserData();
5323 return breakpoint->GetLocationAtIndex(item.GetIdentifier());
5324 }
5325
5326 void TreeDelegateDrawTreeItem(TreeItem &item, Window &window) override {
5327 BreakpointLocationSP breakpoint_location = GetBreakpointLocation(item);
5328 Process *process = GetProcess();
5329 StreamString stream;
5330 stream.Printf("%i.%i: ", breakpoint_location->GetBreakpoint().GetID(),
5331 breakpoint_location->GetID());
5332 Address address = breakpoint_location->GetAddress();
5333 address.Dump(&stream, process, Address::DumpStyleResolvedDescription,
5334 Address::DumpStyleInvalid);
5335 window.PutCStringTruncated(1, stream.GetString().str().c_str());
5336 }
5337
5338 StringList ComputeDetailsList(BreakpointLocationSP breakpoint_location) {
5339 StringList details;
5340
5341 Address address = breakpoint_location->GetAddress();
5342 SymbolContext symbol_context;
5343 address.CalculateSymbolContext(&symbol_context);
5344
5345 if (symbol_context.module_sp) {
5346 StreamString module_stream;
5347 module_stream.PutCString("module = ");
5348 symbol_context.module_sp->GetFileSpec().Dump(
5349 module_stream.AsRawOstream());
5350 details.AppendString(module_stream.GetString());
5351 }
5352
5353 if (symbol_context.comp_unit != nullptr) {
5354 StreamString compile_unit_stream;
5355 compile_unit_stream.PutCString("compile unit = ");
5356 symbol_context.comp_unit->GetPrimaryFile().GetFilename().Dump(
5357 &compile_unit_stream);
5358 details.AppendString(compile_unit_stream.GetString());
5359
5360 if (symbol_context.function != nullptr) {
5361 StreamString function_stream;
5362 function_stream.PutCString("function = ");
5363 function_stream.PutCString(
5364 symbol_context.function->GetName().AsCString("<unknown>"));
5365 details.AppendString(function_stream.GetString());
5366 }
5367
5368 if (symbol_context.line_entry.line > 0) {
5369 StreamString location_stream;
5370 location_stream.PutCString("location = ");
5371 symbol_context.line_entry.DumpStopContext(&location_stream, true);
5372 details.AppendString(location_stream.GetString());
5373 }
5374
5375 } else {
5376 if (symbol_context.symbol) {
5377 StreamString symbol_stream;
5378 if (breakpoint_location->IsReExported())
5379 symbol_stream.PutCString("re-exported target = ");
5380 else
5381 symbol_stream.PutCString("symbol = ");
5382 symbol_stream.PutCString(
5383 symbol_context.symbol->GetName().AsCString("<unknown>"));
5384 details.AppendString(symbol_stream.GetString());
5385 }
5386 }
5387
5388 Process *process = GetProcess();
5389
5390 StreamString address_stream;
5391 address.Dump(&address_stream, process, Address::DumpStyleLoadAddress,
5392 Address::DumpStyleModuleWithFileAddress);
5393 details.AppendString(address_stream.GetString());
5394
5395 BreakpointSiteSP breakpoint_site = breakpoint_location->GetBreakpointSite();
5396 if (breakpoint_location->IsIndirect() && breakpoint_site) {
5397 Address resolved_address;
5398 resolved_address.SetLoadAddress(breakpoint_site->GetLoadAddress(),
5399 &breakpoint_location->GetTarget());
5400 const Symbol *resolved_symbol =
5401 resolved_address.CalculateSymbolContextSymbol();
5402 if (resolved_symbol) {
5403 StreamString indirect_target_stream;
5404 indirect_target_stream.PutCString("indirect target = ");
5405 indirect_target_stream.PutCString(
5406 resolved_symbol->GetName().GetCString());
5407 details.AppendString(indirect_target_stream.GetString());
5408 }
5409 }
5410
5411 bool is_resolved = breakpoint_location->IsResolved();
5412 StreamString resolved_stream;
5413 resolved_stream.Printf("resolved = %s", is_resolved ? "true" : "false");
5414 details.AppendString(resolved_stream.GetString());
5415
5416 bool is_hardware = is_resolved && breakpoint_site->IsHardware();
5417 StreamString hardware_stream;
5418 hardware_stream.Printf("hardware = %s", is_hardware ? "true" : "false");
5419 details.AppendString(hardware_stream.GetString());
5420
5421 StreamString hit_count_stream;
5422 hit_count_stream.Printf("hit count = %-4u",
5423 breakpoint_location->GetHitCount());
5424 details.AppendString(hit_count_stream.GetString());
5425
5426 return details;
5427 }
5428
5429 void TreeDelegateGenerateChildren(TreeItem &item) override {
5430 BreakpointLocationSP breakpoint_location = GetBreakpointLocation(item);
5431 StringList details = ComputeDetailsList(breakpoint_location);
5432
5433 if (!m_string_delegate_sp)
5434 m_string_delegate_sp = std::make_shared<TextTreeDelegate>();
5435
5436 item.Resize(details.GetSize(), *m_string_delegate_sp, false);
5437 for (size_t i = 0; i < details.GetSize(); i++) {
5438 item[i].SetText(details.GetStringAtIndex(i));
5439 }
5440 }
5441
5442 bool TreeDelegateItemSelected(TreeItem &item) override { return false; }
5443
5444protected:
5445 Debugger &m_debugger;
5446 std::shared_ptr<TextTreeDelegate> m_string_delegate_sp;
5447};
5448
5449class BreakpointTreeDelegate : public TreeDelegate {
5450public:
5451 BreakpointTreeDelegate(Debugger &debugger)
5452 : TreeDelegate(), m_debugger(debugger),
5453 m_breakpoint_location_delegate_sp() {}
5454
5455 ~BreakpointTreeDelegate() override = default;
5456
5457 BreakpointSP GetBreakpoint(const TreeItem &item) {
5458 TargetSP target = m_debugger.GetSelectedTarget();
5459 BreakpointList &breakpoints = target->GetBreakpointList(false);
5460 return breakpoints.GetBreakpointAtIndex(item.GetIdentifier());
5461 }
5462
5463 void TreeDelegateDrawTreeItem(TreeItem &item, Window &window) override {
5464 BreakpointSP breakpoint = GetBreakpoint(item);
5465 StreamString stream;
5466 stream.Format("{0}: ", breakpoint->GetID());
5467 breakpoint->GetResolverDescription(&stream);
5468 breakpoint->GetFilterDescription(&stream);
5469 window.PutCStringTruncated(1, stream.GetString().str().c_str());
5470 }
5471
5472 void TreeDelegateGenerateChildren(TreeItem &item) override {
5473 BreakpointSP breakpoint = GetBreakpoint(item);
5474
5475 if (!m_breakpoint_location_delegate_sp)
5476 m_breakpoint_location_delegate_sp =
5477 std::make_shared<BreakpointLocationTreeDelegate>(m_debugger);
5478
5479 item.Resize(breakpoint->GetNumLocations(),
5480 *m_breakpoint_location_delegate_sp, true);
5481 for (size_t i = 0; i < breakpoint->GetNumLocations(); i++) {
5482 item[i].SetIdentifier(i);
5483 item[i].SetUserData(breakpoint.get());
5484 }
5485 }
5486
5487 bool TreeDelegateItemSelected(TreeItem &item) override { return false; }
5488
5489protected:
5490 Debugger &m_debugger;
5491 std::shared_ptr<BreakpointLocationTreeDelegate>
5492 m_breakpoint_location_delegate_sp;
5493};
5494
5495class BreakpointsTreeDelegate : public TreeDelegate {
5496public:
5497 BreakpointsTreeDelegate(Debugger &debugger)
5498 : TreeDelegate(), m_debugger(debugger), m_breakpoint_delegate_sp() {}
5499
5500 ~BreakpointsTreeDelegate() override = default;
5501
5502 bool TreeDelegateShouldDraw() override {
5503 TargetSP target = m_debugger.GetSelectedTarget();
5504 if (!target)
5505 return false;
5506
5507 return true;
5508 }
5509
5510 void TreeDelegateDrawTreeItem(TreeItem &item, Window &window) override {
5511 window.PutCString("Breakpoints");
5512 }
5513
5514 void TreeDelegateGenerateChildren(TreeItem &item) override {
5515 TargetSP target = m_debugger.GetSelectedTarget();
5516
5517 BreakpointList &breakpoints = target->GetBreakpointList(false);
5518 std::unique_lock<std::recursive_mutex> lock;
5519 breakpoints.GetListMutex(lock);
5520
5521 if (!m_breakpoint_delegate_sp)
5522 m_breakpoint_delegate_sp =
5523 std::make_shared<BreakpointTreeDelegate>(m_debugger);
5524
5525 item.Resize(breakpoints.GetSize(), *m_breakpoint_delegate_sp, true);
5526 for (size_t i = 0; i < breakpoints.GetSize(); i++) {
5527 item[i].SetIdentifier(i);
5528 }
5529 }
5530
5531 bool TreeDelegateItemSelected(TreeItem &item) override { return false; }
5532
5533 bool TreeDelegateExpandRootByDefault() override { return true; }
5534
5535protected:
5536 Debugger &m_debugger;
5537 std::shared_ptr<BreakpointTreeDelegate> m_breakpoint_delegate_sp;
5538};
5539
5540class ValueObjectListDelegate : public WindowDelegate {
5541public:
5542 ValueObjectListDelegate() : m_rows() {}
5543
5544 ValueObjectListDelegate(ValueObjectList &valobj_list) : m_rows() {
5545 SetValues(valobj_list);
5546 }
5547
5548 ~ValueObjectListDelegate() override = default;
5549
5550 void SetValues(ValueObjectList &valobj_list) {
5551 m_selected_row = nullptr;
5552 m_selected_row_idx = 0;
5553 m_first_visible_row = 0;
5554 m_num_rows = 0;
5555 m_rows.clear();
5556 for (auto &valobj_sp : valobj_list.GetObjects())
5557 m_rows.push_back(Row(valobj_sp, nullptr));
5558 }
5559
5560 bool WindowDelegateDraw(Window &window, bool force) override {
5561 m_num_rows = 0;
5562 m_min_x = 2;
5563 m_min_y = 1;
5564 m_max_x = window.GetWidth() - 1;
5565 m_max_y = window.GetHeight() - 1;
5566
5567 window.Erase();
5568 window.DrawTitleBox(window.GetName());
5569
5570 const int num_visible_rows = NumVisibleRows();
5571 const int num_rows = CalculateTotalNumberRows(m_rows);
5572
5573 // If we unexpanded while having something selected our total number of
5574 // rows is less than the num visible rows, then make sure we show all the
5575 // rows by setting the first visible row accordingly.
5576 if (m_first_visible_row > 0 && num_rows < num_visible_rows)
5577 m_first_visible_row = 0;
5578
5579 // Make sure the selected row is always visible
5580 if (m_selected_row_idx < m_first_visible_row)
5581 m_first_visible_row = m_selected_row_idx;
5582 else if (m_first_visible_row + num_visible_rows <= m_selected_row_idx)
5583 m_first_visible_row = m_selected_row_idx - num_visible_rows + 1;
5584
5585 DisplayRows(window, m_rows, g_options);
5586
5587 // Get the selected row
5588 m_selected_row = GetRowForRowIndex(m_selected_row_idx);
5589 // Keep the cursor on the selected row so the highlight and the cursor are
5590 // always on the same line
5591 if (m_selected_row)
5592 window.MoveCursor(m_selected_row->x, m_selected_row->y);
5593
5594 return true; // Drawing handled
5595 }
5596
5597 KeyHelp *WindowDelegateGetKeyHelp() override {
5598 static curses::KeyHelp g_source_view_key_help[] = {
5599 {KEY_UP, "Select previous item"},
5600 {KEY_DOWN, "Select next item"},
5601 {KEY_RIGHT, "Expand selected item"},
5602 {KEY_LEFT, "Unexpand selected item or select parent if not expanded"},
5603 {KEY_PPAGE, "Page up"},
5604 {KEY_NPAGE, "Page down"},
5605 {'A', "Format as annotated address"},
5606 {'b', "Format as binary"},
5607 {'B', "Format as hex bytes with ASCII"},
5608 {'c', "Format as character"},
5609 {'d', "Format as a signed integer"},
5610 {'D', "Format selected value using the default format for the type"},
5611 {'f', "Format as float"},
5612 {'h', "Show help dialog"},
5613 {'i', "Format as instructions"},
5614 {'o', "Format as octal"},
5615 {'p', "Format as pointer"},
5616 {'s', "Format as C string"},
5617 {'t', "Toggle showing/hiding type names"},
5618 {'u', "Format as an unsigned integer"},
5619 {'x', "Format as hex"},
5620 {'X', "Format as uppercase hex"},
5621 {' ', "Toggle item expansion"},
5622 {',', "Page up"},
5623 {'.', "Page down"},
5624 {'\0', nullptr}};
5625 return g_source_view_key_help;
5626 }
5627
5628 HandleCharResult WindowDelegateHandleChar(Window &window, int c) override {
5629 switch (c) {
5630 case 'x':
5631 case 'X':
5632 case 'o':
5633 case 's':
5634 case 'u':
5635 case 'd':
5636 case 'D':
5637 case 'i':
5638 case 'A':
5639 case 'p':
5640 case 'c':
5641 case 'b':
5642 case 'B':
5643 case 'f':
5644 // Change the format for the currently selected item
5645 if (m_selected_row) {
5646 auto valobj_sp = m_selected_row->value.GetSP();
5647 if (valobj_sp)
5648 valobj_sp->SetFormat(FormatForChar(c));
5649 }
5650 return eKeyHandled;
5651
5652 case 't':
5653 // Toggle showing type names
5654 g_options.show_types = !g_options.show_types;
5655 return eKeyHandled;
5656
5657 case ',':
5658 case KEY_PPAGE:
5659 // Page up key
5660 if (m_first_visible_row > 0) {
5661 if (static_cast<int>(m_first_visible_row) > m_max_y)
5662 m_first_visible_row -= m_max_y;
5663 else
5664 m_first_visible_row = 0;
5665 m_selected_row_idx = m_first_visible_row;
5666 }
5667 return eKeyHandled;
5668
5669 case '.':
5670 case KEY_NPAGE:
5671 // Page down key
5672 if (m_num_rows > static_cast<size_t>(m_max_y)) {
5673 if (m_first_visible_row + m_max_y < m_num_rows) {
5674 m_first_visible_row += m_max_y;
5675 m_selected_row_idx = m_first_visible_row;
5676 }
5677 }
5678 return eKeyHandled;
5679
5680 case KEY_UP:
5681 if (m_selected_row_idx > 0)
5682 --m_selected_row_idx;
5683 return eKeyHandled;
5684
5685 case KEY_DOWN:
5686 if (m_selected_row_idx + 1 < m_num_rows)
5687 ++m_selected_row_idx;
5688 return eKeyHandled;
5689
5690 case KEY_RIGHT:
5691 if (m_selected_row) {
5692 if (!m_selected_row->expanded)
5693 m_selected_row->Expand();
5694 }
5695 return eKeyHandled;
5696
5697 case KEY_LEFT:
5698 if (m_selected_row) {
5699 if (m_selected_row->expanded)
5700 m_selected_row->Unexpand();
5701 else if (m_selected_row->parent)
5702 m_selected_row_idx = m_selected_row->parent->row_idx;
5703 }
5704 return eKeyHandled;
5705
5706 case ' ':
5707 // Toggle expansion state when SPACE is pressed
5708 if (m_selected_row) {
5709 if (m_selected_row->expanded)
5710 m_selected_row->Unexpand();
5711 else
5712 m_selected_row->Expand();
5713 }
5714 return eKeyHandled;
5715
5716 case 'h':
5717 window.CreateHelpSubwindow();
5718 return eKeyHandled;
5719
5720 default:
5721 break;
5722 }
5723 return eKeyNotHandled;
5724 }
5725
5726protected:
5727 std::vector<Row> m_rows;
5728 Row *m_selected_row = nullptr;
5729 uint32_t m_selected_row_idx = 0;
5730 uint32_t m_first_visible_row = 0;
5731 uint32_t m_num_rows = 0;
5732 int m_min_x = 0;
5733 int m_min_y = 0;
5734 int m_max_x = 0;
5735 int m_max_y = 0;
5736
5737 static Format FormatForChar(int c) {
5738 switch (c) {
5739 case 'x':
5740 return eFormatHex;
5741 case 'X':
5742 return eFormatHexUppercase;
5743 case 'o':
5744 return eFormatOctal;
5745 case 's':
5746 return eFormatCString;
5747 case 'u':
5748 return eFormatUnsigned;
5749 case 'd':
5750 return eFormatDecimal;
5751 case 'D':
5752 return eFormatDefault;
5753 case 'i':
5754 return eFormatInstruction;
5755 case 'A':
5756 return eFormatAddressInfo;
5757 case 'p':
5758 return eFormatPointer;
5759 case 'c':
5760 return eFormatChar;
5761 case 'b':
5762 return eFormatBinary;
5763 case 'B':
5764 return eFormatBytesWithASCII;
5765 case 'f':
5766 return eFormatFloat;
5767 }
5768 return eFormatDefault;
5769 }
5770
5771 bool DisplayRowObject(Window &window, Row &row, DisplayOptions &options,
5772 bool highlight, bool last_child) {
5773 ValueObject *valobj = row.value.GetSP().get();
5774
5775 if (valobj == nullptr)
5776 return false;
5777
5778 const char *type_name =
5779 options.show_types ? valobj->GetTypeName().GetCString() : nullptr;
5780 const char *name = valobj->GetName().GetCString();
5781 const char *value = valobj->GetValueAsCString();
5782 const char *summary = valobj->GetSummaryAsCString();
5783
5784 window.MoveCursor(row.x, row.y);
5785
5786 row.DrawTree(window);
5787
5788 if (highlight)
5789 window.AttributeOn(A_REVERSE);
5790
5791 if (type_name && type_name[0])
5792 window.PrintfTruncated(1, "(%s) ", type_name);
5793
5794 if (name && name[0])
5795 window.PutCStringTruncated(1, name);
5796
5797 attr_t changd_attr = 0;
5798 if (valobj->GetValueDidChange())
5799 changd_attr = COLOR_PAIR(RedOnBlack) | A_BOLD;
5800
5801 if (value && value[0]) {
5802 window.PutCStringTruncated(1, " = ");
5803 if (changd_attr)
5804 window.AttributeOn(changd_attr);
5805 window.PutCStringTruncated(1, value);
5806 if (changd_attr)
5807 window.AttributeOff(changd_attr);
5808 }
5809
5810 if (summary && summary[0]) {
5811 window.PutCStringTruncated(1, " ");
5812 if (changd_attr)
5813 window.AttributeOn(changd_attr);
5814 window.PutCStringTruncated(1, summary);
5815 if (changd_attr)
5816 window.AttributeOff(changd_attr);
5817 }
5818
5819 if (highlight)
5820 window.AttributeOff(A_REVERSE);
5821
5822 return true;
5823 }
5824
5825 void DisplayRows(Window &window, std::vector<Row> &rows,
5826 DisplayOptions &options) {
5827 // > 0x25B7
5828 // \/ 0x25BD
5829
5830 bool window_is_active = window.IsActive();
5831 for (auto &row : rows) {
5832 const bool last_child = row.parent && &rows[rows.size() - 1] == &row;
5833 // Save the row index in each Row structure
5834 row.row_idx = m_num_rows;
5835 if ((m_num_rows >= m_first_visible_row) &&
5836 ((m_num_rows - m_first_visible_row) <
5837 static_cast<size_t>(NumVisibleRows()))) {
5838 row.x = m_min_x;
5839 row.y = m_num_rows - m_first_visible_row + 1;
5840 if (DisplayRowObject(window, row, options,
5841 window_is_active &&
5842 m_num_rows == m_selected_row_idx,
5843 last_child)) {
5844 ++m_num_rows;
5845 } else {
5846 row.x = 0;
5847 row.y = 0;
5848 }
5849 } else {
5850 row.x = 0;
5851 row.y = 0;
5852 ++m_num_rows;
5853 }
5854
5855 if (row.expanded) {
5856 auto &children = row.GetChildren();
5857 if (!children.empty()) {
5858 DisplayRows(window, children, options);
5859 }
5860 }
5861 }
5862 }
5863
5864 int CalculateTotalNumberRows(std::vector<Row> &rows) {
5865 int row_count = 0;
5866 for (auto &row : rows) {
5867 ++row_count;
5868 if (row.expanded)
5869 row_count += CalculateTotalNumberRows(row.GetChildren());
5870 }
5871 return row_count;
5872 }
5873
5874 static Row *GetRowForRowIndexImpl(std::vector<Row> &rows, size_t &row_index) {
5875 for (auto &row : rows) {
5876 if (row_index == 0)
5877 return &row;
5878 else {
5879 --row_index;
5880 if (row.expanded) {
5881 auto &children = row.GetChildren();
5882 if (!children.empty()) {
5883 Row *result = GetRowForRowIndexImpl(children, row_index);
5884 if (result)
5885 return result;
5886 }
5887 }
5888 }
5889 }
5890 return nullptr;
5891 }
5892
5893 Row *GetRowForRowIndex(size_t row_index) {
5894 return GetRowForRowIndexImpl(m_rows, row_index);
5895 }
5896
5897 int NumVisibleRows() const { return m_max_y - m_min_y; }
5898
5899 static DisplayOptions g_options;
5900};
5901
5902class FrameVariablesWindowDelegate : public ValueObjectListDelegate {
5903public:
5904 FrameVariablesWindowDelegate(Debugger &debugger)
5905 : ValueObjectListDelegate(), m_debugger(debugger) {}
5906
5907 ~FrameVariablesWindowDelegate() override = default;
5908
5909 const char *WindowDelegateGetHelpText() override {
5910 return "Frame variable window keyboard shortcuts:";
5911 }
5912
5913 bool WindowDelegateDraw(Window &window, bool force) override {
5914 ExecutionContext exe_ctx(
5915 m_debugger.GetCommandInterpreter().GetExecutionContext());
5916 Process *process = exe_ctx.GetProcessPtr();
5917 Block *frame_block = nullptr;
5918 StackFrame *frame = nullptr;
5919
5920 if (process) {
5921 StateType state = process->GetState();
5922 if (StateIsStoppedState(state, true)) {
5923 frame = exe_ctx.GetFramePtr();
5924 if (frame)
5925 frame_block = frame->GetFrameBlock();
5926 } else if (StateIsRunningState(state)) {
5927 return true; // Don't do any updating when we are running
5928 }
5929 }
5930
5931 ValueObjectList local_values;
5932 if (frame_block) {
5933 // Only update the variables if they have changed
5934 if (m_frame_block != frame_block) {
5935 m_frame_block = frame_block;
5936
5937 VariableList *locals = frame->GetVariableList(true, nullptr);
5938 if (locals) {
5939 const DynamicValueType use_dynamic = eDynamicDontRunTarget;
5940 for (const VariableSP &local_sp : *locals) {
5941 ValueObjectSP value_sp =
5942 frame->GetValueObjectForFrameVariable(local_sp, use_dynamic);
5943 if (value_sp) {
5944 ValueObjectSP synthetic_value_sp = value_sp->GetSyntheticValue();
5945 if (synthetic_value_sp)
5946 local_values.Append(synthetic_value_sp);
5947 else
5948 local_values.Append(value_sp);
5949 }
5950 }
5951 // Update the values
5952 SetValues(local_values);
5953 }
5954 }
5955 } else {
5956 m_frame_block = nullptr;
5957 // Update the values with an empty list if there is no frame
5958 SetValues(local_values);
5959 }
5960
5961 return ValueObjectListDelegate::WindowDelegateDraw(window, force);
5962 }
5963
5964protected:
5965 Debugger &m_debugger;
5966 Block *m_frame_block = nullptr;
5967};
5968
5969class RegistersWindowDelegate : public ValueObjectListDelegate {
5970public:
5971 RegistersWindowDelegate(Debugger &debugger)
5972 : ValueObjectListDelegate(), m_debugger(debugger) {}
5973
5974 ~RegistersWindowDelegate() override = default;
5975
5976 const char *WindowDelegateGetHelpText() override {
5977 return "Register window keyboard shortcuts:";
5978 }
5979
5980 bool WindowDelegateDraw(Window &window, bool force) override {
5981 ExecutionContext exe_ctx(
5982 m_debugger.GetCommandInterpreter().GetExecutionContext());
5983 StackFrame *frame = exe_ctx.GetFramePtr();
5984
5985 ValueObjectList value_list;
5986 if (frame) {
5987 if (frame->GetStackID() != m_stack_id) {
5988 m_stack_id = frame->GetStackID();
5989 RegisterContextSP reg_ctx(frame->GetRegisterContext());
5990 if (reg_ctx) {
5991 const uint32_t num_sets = reg_ctx->GetRegisterSetCount();
5992 for (uint32_t set_idx = 0; set_idx < num_sets; ++set_idx) {
5993 value_list.Append(
5994 ValueObjectRegisterSet::Create(frame, reg_ctx, set_idx));
5995 }
5996 }
5997 SetValues(value_list);
5998 }
5999 } else {
6000 Process *process = exe_ctx.GetProcessPtr();
6001 if (process && process->IsAlive())
6002 return true; // Don't do any updating if we are running
6003 else {
6004 // Update the values with an empty list if there is no process or the
6005 // process isn't alive anymore
6006 SetValues(value_list);
6007 }
6008 }
6009 return ValueObjectListDelegate::WindowDelegateDraw(window, force);
6010 }
6011
6012protected:
6013 Debugger &m_debugger;
6014 StackID m_stack_id;
6015};
6016
6017static const char *CursesKeyToCString(int ch) {
6018 static char g_desc[32];
6019 if (ch >= KEY_F0 && ch < KEY_F0 + 64) {
6020 snprintf(g_desc, sizeof(g_desc), "F%u", ch - KEY_F0);
6021 return g_desc;
6022 }
6023 switch (ch) {
6024 case KEY_DOWN:
6025 return "down";
6026 case KEY_UP:
6027 return "up";
6028 case KEY_LEFT:
6029 return "left";
6030 case KEY_RIGHT:
6031 return "right";
6032 case KEY_HOME:
6033 return "home";
6034 case KEY_BACKSPACE:
6035 return "backspace";
6036 case KEY_DL:
6037 return "delete-line";
6038 case KEY_IL:
6039 return "insert-line";
6040 case KEY_DC:
6041 return "delete-char";
6042 case KEY_IC:
6043 return "insert-char";
6044 case KEY_CLEAR:
6045 return "clear";
6046 case KEY_EOS:
6047 return "clear-to-eos";
6048 case KEY_EOL:
6049 return "clear-to-eol";
6050 case KEY_SF:
6051 return "scroll-forward";
6052 case KEY_SR:
6053 return "scroll-backward";
6054 case KEY_NPAGE:
6055 return "page-down";
6056 case KEY_PPAGE:
6057 return "page-up";
6058 case KEY_STAB:
6059 return "set-tab";
6060 case KEY_CTAB:
6061 return "clear-tab";
6062 case KEY_CATAB:
6063 return "clear-all-tabs";
6064 case KEY_ENTER:
6065 return "enter";
6066 case KEY_PRINT:
6067 return "print";
6068 case KEY_LL:
6069 return "lower-left key";
6070 case KEY_A1:
6071 return "upper left of keypad";
6072 case KEY_A3:
6073 return "upper right of keypad";
6074 case KEY_B2:
6075 return "center of keypad";
6076 case KEY_C1:
6077 return "lower left of keypad";
6078 case KEY_C3:
6079 return "lower right of keypad";
6080 case KEY_BTAB:
6081 return "back-tab key";
6082 case KEY_BEG:
6083 return "begin key";
6084 case KEY_CANCEL:
6085 return "cancel key";
6086 case KEY_CLOSE:
6087 return "close key";
6088 case KEY_COMMAND:
6089 return "command key";
6090 case KEY_COPY:
6091 return "copy key";
6092 case KEY_CREATE:
6093 return "create key";
6094 case KEY_END:
6095 return "end key";
6096 case KEY_EXIT:
6097 return "exit key";
6098 case KEY_FIND:
6099 return "find key";
6100 case KEY_HELP:
6101 return "help key";
6102 case KEY_MARK:
6103 return "mark key";
6104 case KEY_MESSAGE:
6105 return "message key";
6106 case KEY_MOVE:
6107 return "move key";
6108 case KEY_NEXT:
6109 return "next key";
6110 case KEY_OPEN:
6111 return "open key";
6112 case KEY_OPTIONS:
6113 return "options key";
6114 case KEY_PREVIOUS:
6115 return "previous key";
6116 case KEY_REDO:
6117 return "redo key";
6118 case KEY_REFERENCE:
6119 return "reference key";
6120 case KEY_REFRESH:
6121 return "refresh key";
6122 case KEY_REPLACE:
6123 return "replace key";
6124 case KEY_RESTART:
6125 return "restart key";
6126 case KEY_RESUME:
6127 return "resume key";
6128 case KEY_SAVE:
6129 return "save key";
6130 case KEY_SBEG:
6131 return "shifted begin key";
6132 case KEY_SCANCEL:
6133 return "shifted cancel key";
6134 case KEY_SCOMMAND:
6135 return "shifted command key";
6136 case KEY_SCOPY:
6137 return "shifted copy key";
6138 case KEY_SCREATE:
6139 return "shifted create key";
6140 case KEY_SDC:
6141 return "shifted delete-character key";
6142 case KEY_SDL:
6143 return "shifted delete-line key";
6144 case KEY_SELECT:
6145 return "select key";
6146 case KEY_SEND:
6147 return "shifted end key";
6148 case KEY_SEOL:
6149 return "shifted clear-to-end-of-line key";
6150 case KEY_SEXIT:
6151 return "shifted exit key";
6152 case KEY_SFIND:
6153 return "shifted find key";
6154 case KEY_SHELP:
6155 return "shifted help key";
6156 case KEY_SHOME:
6157 return "shifted home key";
6158 case KEY_SIC:
6159 return "shifted insert-character key";
6160 case KEY_SLEFT:
6161 return "shifted left-arrow key";
6162 case KEY_SMESSAGE:
6163 return "shifted message key";
6164 case KEY_SMOVE:
6165 return "shifted move key";
6166 case KEY_SNEXT:
6167 return "shifted next key";
6168 case KEY_SOPTIONS:
6169 return "shifted options key";
6170 case KEY_SPREVIOUS:
6171 return "shifted previous key";
6172 case KEY_SPRINT:
6173 return "shifted print key";
6174 case KEY_SREDO:
6175 return "shifted redo key";
6176 case KEY_SREPLACE:
6177 return "shifted replace key";
6178 case KEY_SRIGHT:
6179 return "shifted right-arrow key";
6180 case KEY_SRSUME:
6181 return "shifted resume key";
6182 case KEY_SSAVE:
6183 return "shifted save key";
6184 case KEY_SSUSPEND:
6185 return "shifted suspend key";
6186 case KEY_SUNDO:
6187 return "shifted undo key";
6188 case KEY_SUSPEND:
6189 return "suspend key";
6190 case KEY_UNDO:
6191 return "undo key";
6192 case KEY_MOUSE:
6193 return "Mouse event has occurred";
6194 case KEY_RESIZE:
6195 return "Terminal resize event";
6196#ifdef KEY_EVENT
6197 case KEY_EVENT:
6198 return "We were interrupted by an event";
6199#endif
6200 case KEY_RETURN:
6201 return "return";
6202 case ' ':
6203 return "space";
6204 case '\t':
6205 return "tab";
6206 case KEY_ESCAPE:
6207 return "escape";
6208 default:
6209 if (llvm::isPrint(ch))
6210 snprintf(g_desc, sizeof(g_desc), "%c", ch);
6211 else
6212 snprintf(g_desc, sizeof(g_desc), "\\x%2.2x", ch);
6213 return g_desc;
6214 }
6215 return nullptr;
6216}
6217
6218HelpDialogDelegate::HelpDialogDelegate(const char *text,
6219 KeyHelp *key_help_array)
6220 : m_text() {
6221 if (text && text[0]) {
6222 m_text.SplitIntoLines(text);
6223 m_text.AppendString("");
6224 }
6225 if (key_help_array) {
6226 for (KeyHelp *key = key_help_array; key->ch; ++key) {
6227 StreamString key_description;
6228 key_description.Printf("%10s - %s", CursesKeyToCString(key->ch),
6229 key->description);
6230 m_text.AppendString(key_description.GetString());
6231 }
6232 }
6233}
6234
6235HelpDialogDelegate::~HelpDialogDelegate() = default;
6236
6237bool HelpDialogDelegate::WindowDelegateDraw(Window &window, bool force) {
6238 window.Erase();
6239 const int window_height = window.GetHeight();
6240 int x = 2;
6241 int y = 1;
6242 const int min_y = y;
6243 const int max_y = window_height - 1 - y;
6244 const size_t num_visible_lines = max_y - min_y + 1;
6245 const size_t num_lines = m_text.GetSize();
6246 const char *bottom_message;
6247 if (num_lines <= num_visible_lines)
6248 bottom_message = "Press any key to exit";
6249 else
6250 bottom_message = "Use arrows to scroll, any other key to exit";
6251 window.DrawTitleBox(window.GetName(), bottom_message);
6252 while (y <= max_y) {
6253 window.MoveCursor(x, y);
6254 window.PutCStringTruncated(
6255 1, m_text.GetStringAtIndex(m_first_visible_line + y - min_y));
6256 ++y;
6257 }
6258 return true;
6259}
6260
6261HandleCharResult HelpDialogDelegate::WindowDelegateHandleChar(Window &window,
6262 int key) {
6263 bool done = false;
6264 const size_t num_lines = m_text.GetSize();
6265 const size_t num_visible_lines = window.GetHeight() - 2;
6266
6267 if (num_lines <= num_visible_lines) {
6268 done = true;
6269 // If we have all lines visible and don't need scrolling, then any key
6270 // press will cause us to exit
6271 } else {
6272 switch (key) {
6273 case KEY_UP:
6274 if (m_first_visible_line > 0)
6275 --m_first_visible_line;
6276 break;
6277
6278 case KEY_DOWN:
6279 if (m_first_visible_line + num_visible_lines < num_lines)
6280 ++m_first_visible_line;
6281 break;
6282
6283 case KEY_PPAGE:
6284 case ',':
6285 if (m_first_visible_line > 0) {
6286 if (static_cast<size_t>(m_first_visible_line) >= num_visible_lines)
6287 m_first_visible_line -= num_visible_lines;
6288 else
6289 m_first_visible_line = 0;
6290 }
6291 break;
6292
6293 case KEY_NPAGE:
6294 case '.':
6295 if (m_first_visible_line + num_visible_lines < num_lines) {
6296 m_first_visible_line += num_visible_lines;
6297 if (static_cast<size_t>(m_first_visible_line) > num_lines)
6298 m_first_visible_line = num_lines - num_visible_lines;
6299 }
6300 break;
6301
6302 default:
6303 done = true;
6304 break;
6305 }
6306 }
6307 if (done)
6308 window.GetParent()->RemoveSubWindow(&window);
6309 return eKeyHandled;
6310}
6311
6312class ApplicationDelegate : public WindowDelegate, public MenuDelegate {
6313public:
6314 enum {
6315 eMenuID_LLDB = 1,
6316 eMenuID_LLDBAbout,
6317 eMenuID_LLDBExit,
6318
6319 eMenuID_Target,
6320 eMenuID_TargetCreate,
6321 eMenuID_TargetDelete,
6322
6323 eMenuID_Process,
6324 eMenuID_ProcessAttach,
6325 eMenuID_ProcessDetachResume,
6326 eMenuID_ProcessDetachSuspended,
6327 eMenuID_ProcessLaunch,
6328 eMenuID_ProcessContinue,
6329 eMenuID_ProcessHalt,
6330 eMenuID_ProcessKill,
6331
6332 eMenuID_Thread,
6333 eMenuID_ThreadStepIn,
6334 eMenuID_ThreadStepOver,
6335 eMenuID_ThreadStepOut,
6336
6337 eMenuID_View,
6338 eMenuID_ViewBacktrace,
6339 eMenuID_ViewRegisters,
6340 eMenuID_ViewSource,
6341 eMenuID_ViewVariables,
6342 eMenuID_ViewBreakpoints,
6343
6344 eMenuID_Help,
6345 eMenuID_HelpGUIHelp
6346 };
6347
6348 ApplicationDelegate(Application &app, Debugger &debugger)
6349 : WindowDelegate(), MenuDelegate(), m_app(app), m_debugger(debugger) {}
6350
6351 ~ApplicationDelegate() override = default;
6352
6353 bool WindowDelegateDraw(Window &window, bool force) override {
6354 return false; // Drawing not handled, let standard window drawing happen
6355 }
6356
6357 HandleCharResult WindowDelegateHandleChar(Window &window, int key) override {
6358 switch (key) {
6359 case '\t':
6360 window.SelectNextWindowAsActive();
6361 return eKeyHandled;
6362
6363 case KEY_SHIFT_TAB:
6364 window.SelectPreviousWindowAsActive();
6365 return eKeyHandled;
6366
6367 case 'h':
6368 window.CreateHelpSubwindow();
6369 return eKeyHandled;
6370
6371 case KEY_ESCAPE:
6372 return eQuitApplication;
6373
6374 default:
6375 break;
6376 }
6377 return eKeyNotHandled;
6378 }
6379
6380 const char *WindowDelegateGetHelpText() override {
6381 return "Welcome to the LLDB curses GUI.\n\n"
6382 "Press the TAB key to change the selected view.\n"
6383 "Each view has its own keyboard shortcuts, press 'h' to open a "
6384 "dialog to display them.\n\n"
6385 "Common key bindings for all views:";
6386 }
6387
6388 KeyHelp *WindowDelegateGetKeyHelp() override {
6389 static curses::KeyHelp g_source_view_key_help[] = {
6390 {'\t', "Select next view"},
6391 {KEY_BTAB, "Select previous view"},
6392 {'h', "Show help dialog with view specific key bindings"},
6393 {',', "Page up"},
6394 {'.', "Page down"},
6395 {KEY_UP, "Select previous"},
6396 {KEY_DOWN, "Select next"},
6397 {KEY_LEFT, "Unexpand or select parent"},
6398 {KEY_RIGHT, "Expand"},
6399 {KEY_PPAGE, "Page up"},
6400 {KEY_NPAGE, "Page down"},
6401 {'\0', nullptr}};
6402 return g_source_view_key_help;
6403 }
6404
6405 MenuActionResult MenuDelegateAction(Menu &menu) override {
6406 switch (menu.GetIdentifier()) {
6407 case eMenuID_TargetCreate: {
6408 WindowSP main_window_sp = m_app.GetMainWindow();
6409 FormDelegateSP form_delegate_sp =
6410 FormDelegateSP(new TargetCreateFormDelegate(m_debugger));
6411 Rect bounds = main_window_sp->GetCenteredRect(80, 19);
6412 WindowSP form_window_sp = main_window_sp->CreateSubWindow(
6413 form_delegate_sp->GetName().c_str(), bounds, true);
6414 WindowDelegateSP window_delegate_sp =
6415 WindowDelegateSP(new FormWindowDelegate(form_delegate_sp));
6416 form_window_sp->SetDelegate(window_delegate_sp);
6417 return MenuActionResult::Handled;
6418 }
6419 case eMenuID_ThreadStepIn: {
6420 ExecutionContext exe_ctx =
6421 m_debugger.GetCommandInterpreter().GetExecutionContext();
6422 if (exe_ctx.HasThreadScope()) {
6423 Process *process = exe_ctx.GetProcessPtr();
6424 if (process && process->IsAlive() &&
6425 StateIsStoppedState(process->GetState(), true))
6426 exe_ctx.GetThreadRef().StepIn(true);
6427 }
6428 }
6429 return MenuActionResult::Handled;
6430
6431 case eMenuID_ThreadStepOut: {
6432 ExecutionContext exe_ctx =
6433 m_debugger.GetCommandInterpreter().GetExecutionContext();
6434 if (exe_ctx.HasThreadScope()) {
6435 Process *process = exe_ctx.GetProcessPtr();
6436 if (process && process->IsAlive() &&
6437 StateIsStoppedState(process->GetState(), true)) {
6438 Thread *thread = exe_ctx.GetThreadPtr();
6439 uint32_t frame_idx =
6440 thread->GetSelectedFrameIndex(SelectMostRelevantFrame);
6441 exe_ctx.GetThreadRef().StepOut(frame_idx);
6442 }
6443 }
6444 }
6445 return MenuActionResult::Handled;
6446
6447 case eMenuID_ThreadStepOver: {
6448 ExecutionContext exe_ctx =
6449 m_debugger.GetCommandInterpreter().GetExecutionContext();
6450 if (exe_ctx.HasThreadScope()) {
6451 Process *process = exe_ctx.GetProcessPtr();
6452 if (process && process->IsAlive() &&
6453 StateIsStoppedState(process->GetState(), true))
6454 exe_ctx.GetThreadRef().StepOver(true);
6455 }
6456 }
6457 return MenuActionResult::Handled;
6458
6459 case eMenuID_ProcessAttach: {
6460 WindowSP main_window_sp = m_app.GetMainWindow();
6461 FormDelegateSP form_delegate_sp = FormDelegateSP(
6462 new ProcessAttachFormDelegate(m_debugger, main_window_sp));
6463 Rect bounds = main_window_sp->GetCenteredRect(80, 22);
6464 WindowSP form_window_sp = main_window_sp->CreateSubWindow(
6465 form_delegate_sp->GetName().c_str(), bounds, true);
6466 WindowDelegateSP window_delegate_sp =
6467 WindowDelegateSP(new FormWindowDelegate(form_delegate_sp));
6468 form_window_sp->SetDelegate(window_delegate_sp);
6469 return MenuActionResult::Handled;
6470 }
6471 case eMenuID_ProcessLaunch: {
6472 WindowSP main_window_sp = m_app.GetMainWindow();
6473 FormDelegateSP form_delegate_sp = FormDelegateSP(
6474 new ProcessLaunchFormDelegate(m_debugger, main_window_sp));
6475 Rect bounds = main_window_sp->GetCenteredRect(80, 22);
6476 WindowSP form_window_sp = main_window_sp->CreateSubWindow(
6477 form_delegate_sp->GetName().c_str(), bounds, true);
6478 WindowDelegateSP window_delegate_sp =
6479 WindowDelegateSP(new FormWindowDelegate(form_delegate_sp));
6480 form_window_sp->SetDelegate(window_delegate_sp);
6481 return MenuActionResult::Handled;
6482 }
6483
6484 case eMenuID_ProcessContinue: {
6485 ExecutionContext exe_ctx =
6486 m_debugger.GetCommandInterpreter().GetExecutionContext();
6487 if (exe_ctx.HasProcessScope()) {
6488 Process *process = exe_ctx.GetProcessPtr();
6489 if (process && process->IsAlive() &&
6490 StateIsStoppedState(process->GetState(), true))
6491 process->Resume();
6492 }
6493 }
6494 return MenuActionResult::Handled;
6495
6496 case eMenuID_ProcessKill: {
6497 ExecutionContext exe_ctx =
6498 m_debugger.GetCommandInterpreter().GetExecutionContext();
6499 if (exe_ctx.HasProcessScope()) {
6500 Process *process = exe_ctx.GetProcessPtr();
6501 if (process && process->IsAlive())
6502 process->Destroy(false);
6503 }
6504 }
6505 return MenuActionResult::Handled;
6506
6507 case eMenuID_ProcessHalt: {
6508 ExecutionContext exe_ctx =
6509 m_debugger.GetCommandInterpreter().GetExecutionContext();
6510 if (exe_ctx.HasProcessScope()) {
6511 Process *process = exe_ctx.GetProcessPtr();
6512 if (process && process->IsAlive())
6513 process->Halt();
6514 }
6515 }
6516 return MenuActionResult::Handled;
6517
6518 case eMenuID_ProcessDetachResume:
6519 case eMenuID_ProcessDetachSuspended: {
6520 ExecutionContext exe_ctx =
6521 m_debugger.GetCommandInterpreter().GetExecutionContext();
6522 if (exe_ctx.HasProcessScope()) {
6523 Process *process = exe_ctx.GetProcessPtr();
6524 if (process && process->IsAlive())
6525 process->Detach(menu.GetIdentifier() ==
6526 eMenuID_ProcessDetachSuspended);
6527 }
6528 }
6529 return MenuActionResult::Handled;
6530
6531 case eMenuID_Process: {
6532 // Populate the menu with all of the threads if the process is stopped
6533 // when the Process menu gets selected and is about to display its
6534 // submenu.
6535 Menus &submenus = menu.GetSubmenus();
6536 ExecutionContext exe_ctx =
6537 m_debugger.GetCommandInterpreter().GetExecutionContext();
6538 Process *process = exe_ctx.GetProcessPtr();
6539 if (process && process->IsAlive() &&
6540 StateIsStoppedState(process->GetState(), true)) {
6541 if (submenus.size() == 7)
6542 menu.AddSubmenu(std::make_shared<Menu>(Menu::Type::Separator));
6543 else if (submenus.size() > 8)
6544 submenus.erase(submenus.begin() + 8, submenus.end());
6545
6546 ThreadList &threads = process->GetThreadList();
6547 std::lock_guard<std::recursive_mutex> guard(threads.GetMutex());
6548 size_t num_threads = threads.GetSize();
6549 for (size_t i = 0; i < num_threads; ++i) {
6550 ThreadSP thread_sp = threads.GetThreadAtIndex(i);
6551 char menu_char = '\0';
6552 if (i < 9)
6553 menu_char = '1' + i;
6554 StreamString thread_menu_title;
6555 thread_menu_title.Printf("Thread %u", thread_sp->GetIndexID());
6556 const char *thread_name = thread_sp->GetName();
6557 if (thread_name && thread_name[0])
6558 thread_menu_title.Printf(" %s", thread_name);
6559 else {
6560 const char *queue_name = thread_sp->GetQueueName();
6561 if (queue_name && queue_name[0])
6562 thread_menu_title.Printf(" %s", queue_name);
6563 }
6564 menu.AddSubmenu(std::make_shared<Menu>(
6565 thread_menu_title.GetString().str().c_str(), nullptr, menu_char,
6566 thread_sp->GetID()));
6567 }
6568 } else if (submenus.size() > 7) {
6569 // Remove the separator and any other thread submenu items that were
6570 // previously added
6571 submenus.erase(submenus.begin() + 7, submenus.end());
6572 }
6573 // Since we are adding and removing items we need to recalculate the
6574 // name lengths
6575 menu.RecalculateNameLengths();
6576 }
6577 return MenuActionResult::Handled;
6578
6579 case eMenuID_ViewVariables: {
6580 WindowSP main_window_sp = m_app.GetMainWindow();
6581 WindowSP source_window_sp = main_window_sp->FindSubWindow("Source");
6582 WindowSP variables_window_sp = main_window_sp->FindSubWindow("Variables");
6583 WindowSP registers_window_sp = main_window_sp->FindSubWindow("Registers");
6584 const Rect source_bounds = source_window_sp->GetBounds();
6585
6586 if (variables_window_sp) {
6587 const Rect variables_bounds = variables_window_sp->GetBounds();
6588
6589 main_window_sp->RemoveSubWindow(variables_window_sp.get());
6590
6591 if (registers_window_sp) {
6592 // We have a registers window, so give all the area back to the
6593 // registers window
6594 Rect registers_bounds = variables_bounds;
6595 registers_bounds.size.width = source_bounds.size.width;
6596 registers_window_sp->SetBounds(registers_bounds);
6597 } else {
6598 // We have no registers window showing so give the bottom area back
6599 // to the source view
6600 source_window_sp->Resize(source_bounds.size.width,
6601 source_bounds.size.height +
6602 variables_bounds.size.height);
6603 }
6604 } else {
6605 Rect new_variables_rect;
6606 if (registers_window_sp) {
6607 // We have a registers window so split the area of the registers
6608 // window into two columns where the left hand side will be the
6609 // variables and the right hand side will be the registers
6610 const Rect variables_bounds = registers_window_sp->GetBounds();
6611 Rect new_registers_rect;
6612 variables_bounds.VerticalSplitPercentage(0.50, new_variables_rect,
6613 new_registers_rect);
6614 registers_window_sp->SetBounds(new_registers_rect);
6615 } else {
6616 // No registers window, grab the bottom part of the source window
6617 Rect new_source_rect;
6618 source_bounds.HorizontalSplitPercentage(0.70, new_source_rect,
6619 new_variables_rect);
6620 source_window_sp->SetBounds(new_source_rect);
6621 }
6622 WindowSP new_window_sp = main_window_sp->CreateSubWindow(
6623 "Variables", new_variables_rect, false);
6624 new_window_sp->SetDelegate(
6625 WindowDelegateSP(new FrameVariablesWindowDelegate(m_debugger)));
6626 }
6627 touchwin(stdscr);
6628 }
6629 return MenuActionResult::Handled;
6630
6631 case eMenuID_ViewRegisters: {
6632 WindowSP main_window_sp = m_app.GetMainWindow();
6633 WindowSP source_window_sp = main_window_sp->FindSubWindow("Source");
6634 WindowSP variables_window_sp = main_window_sp->FindSubWindow("Variables");
6635 WindowSP registers_window_sp = main_window_sp->FindSubWindow("Registers");
6636 const Rect source_bounds = source_window_sp->GetBounds();
6637
6638 if (registers_window_sp) {
6639 if (variables_window_sp) {
6640 const Rect variables_bounds = variables_window_sp->GetBounds();
6641
6642 // We have a variables window, so give all the area back to the
6643 // variables window
6644 variables_window_sp->Resize(variables_bounds.size.width +
6645 registers_window_sp->GetWidth(),
6646 variables_bounds.size.height);
6647 } else {
6648 // We have no variables window showing so give the bottom area back
6649 // to the source view
6650 source_window_sp->Resize(source_bounds.size.width,
6651 source_bounds.size.height +
6652 registers_window_sp->GetHeight());
6653 }
6654 main_window_sp->RemoveSubWindow(registers_window_sp.get());
6655 } else {
6656 Rect new_regs_rect;
6657 if (variables_window_sp) {
6658 // We have a variables window, split it into two columns where the
6659 // left hand side will be the variables and the right hand side will
6660 // be the registers
6661 const Rect variables_bounds = variables_window_sp->GetBounds();
6662 Rect new_vars_rect;
6663 variables_bounds.VerticalSplitPercentage(0.50, new_vars_rect,
6664 new_regs_rect);
6665 variables_window_sp->SetBounds(new_vars_rect);
6666 } else {
6667 // No variables window, grab the bottom part of the source window
6668 Rect new_source_rect;
6669 source_bounds.HorizontalSplitPercentage(0.70, new_source_rect,
6670 new_regs_rect);
6671 source_window_sp->SetBounds(new_source_rect);
6672 }
6673 WindowSP new_window_sp =
6674 main_window_sp->CreateSubWindow("Registers", new_regs_rect, false);
6675 new_window_sp->SetDelegate(
6676 WindowDelegateSP(new RegistersWindowDelegate(m_debugger)));
6677 }
6678 touchwin(stdscr);
6679 }
6680 return MenuActionResult::Handled;
6681
6682 case eMenuID_ViewBreakpoints: {
6683 WindowSP main_window_sp = m_app.GetMainWindow();
6684 WindowSP threads_window_sp = main_window_sp->FindSubWindow("Threads");
6685 WindowSP breakpoints_window_sp =
6686 main_window_sp->FindSubWindow("Breakpoints");
6687 const Rect threads_bounds = threads_window_sp->GetBounds();
6688
6689 // If a breakpoints window already exists, remove it and give the area
6690 // it used to occupy to the threads window. If it doesn't exist, split
6691 // the threads window horizontally into two windows where the top window
6692 // is the threads window and the bottom window is a newly added
6693 // breakpoints window.
6694 if (breakpoints_window_sp) {
6695 threads_window_sp->Resize(threads_bounds.size.width,
6696 threads_bounds.size.height +
6697 breakpoints_window_sp->GetHeight());
6698 main_window_sp->RemoveSubWindow(breakpoints_window_sp.get());
6699 } else {
6700 Rect new_threads_bounds, breakpoints_bounds;
6701 threads_bounds.HorizontalSplitPercentage(0.70, new_threads_bounds,
6702 breakpoints_bounds);
6703 threads_window_sp->SetBounds(new_threads_bounds);
6704 breakpoints_window_sp = main_window_sp->CreateSubWindow(
6705 "Breakpoints", breakpoints_bounds, false);
6706 TreeDelegateSP breakpoints_delegate_sp(
6707 new BreakpointsTreeDelegate(m_debugger));
6708 breakpoints_window_sp->SetDelegate(WindowDelegateSP(
6709 new TreeWindowDelegate(m_debugger, breakpoints_delegate_sp)));
6710 }
6711 touchwin(stdscr);
6712 return MenuActionResult::Handled;
6713 }
6714
6715 case eMenuID_HelpGUIHelp:
6716 m_app.GetMainWindow()->CreateHelpSubwindow();
6717 return MenuActionResult::Handled;
6718
6719 default:
6720 break;
6721 }
6722
6723 return MenuActionResult::NotHandled;
6724 }
6725
6726protected:
6727 Application &m_app;
6728 Debugger &m_debugger;
6729};
6730
6731class StatusBarWindowDelegate : public WindowDelegate {
6732public:
6733 StatusBarWindowDelegate(Debugger &debugger) : m_debugger(debugger) {
6734 FormatEntity::Parse("Thread: ${thread.id%tid}", m_format);
6735 }
6736
6737 ~StatusBarWindowDelegate() override = default;
6738
6739 bool WindowDelegateDraw(Window &window, bool force) override {
6740 ExecutionContext exe_ctx =
6741 m_debugger.GetCommandInterpreter().GetExecutionContext();
6742 Process *process = exe_ctx.GetProcessPtr();
6743 Thread *thread = exe_ctx.GetThreadPtr();
6744 StackFrame *frame = exe_ctx.GetFramePtr();
6745 window.Erase();
6746 window.SetBackground(BlackOnWhite);
6747 window.MoveCursor(0, 0);
6748 if (process) {
6749 const StateType state = process->GetState();
6750 window.Printf("Process: %5" PRIu64 " %10s", process->GetID(),
6751 StateAsCString(state));
6752
6753 if (StateIsStoppedState(state, true)) {
6754 StreamString strm;
6755 if (thread &&
6756 FormatEntity::Formatter(nullptr, &exe_ctx, nullptr, false, false)
6757 .Format(m_format, strm)) {
6758 window.MoveCursor(40, 0);
6759 window.PutCStringTruncated(1, strm.GetString().str().c_str());
6760 }
6761
6762 window.MoveCursor(60, 0);
6763 if (frame)
6764 window.Printf("Frame: %3u PC = 0x%16.16" PRIx64,
6765 frame->GetFrameIndex(),
6766 frame->GetFrameCodeAddress().GetOpcodeLoadAddress(
6767 exe_ctx.GetTargetPtr()));
6768 } else if (state == eStateExited) {
6769 const char *exit_desc = process->GetExitDescription();
6770 const int exit_status = process->GetExitStatus();
6771 if (exit_desc && exit_desc[0])
6772 window.Printf(" with status = %i (%s)", exit_status, exit_desc);
6773 else
6774 window.Printf(" with status = %i", exit_status);
6775 }
6776 }
6777 return true;
6778 }
6779
6780protected:
6781 Debugger &m_debugger;
6782 FormatEntity::Entry m_format;
6783};
6784
6785class SourceFileWindowDelegate : public WindowDelegate {
6786public:
6787 SourceFileWindowDelegate(Debugger &debugger)
6788 : WindowDelegate(), m_debugger(debugger) {}
6789
6790 ~SourceFileWindowDelegate() override = default;
6791
6792 void Update(const SymbolContext &sc) { m_sc = sc; }
6793
6794 uint32_t NumVisibleLines() const { return m_max_y - m_min_y; }
6795
6796 const char *WindowDelegateGetHelpText() override {
6797 return "Source/Disassembly window keyboard shortcuts:";
6798 }
6799
6800 KeyHelp *WindowDelegateGetKeyHelp() override {
6801 static curses::KeyHelp g_source_view_key_help[] = {
6802 {KEY_RETURN, "Run to selected line with one shot breakpoint"},
6803 {KEY_UP, "Select previous source line"},
6804 {KEY_DOWN, "Select next source line"},
6805 {KEY_LEFT, "Scroll to the left"},
6806 {KEY_RIGHT, "Scroll to the right"},
6807 {KEY_PPAGE, "Page up"},
6808 {KEY_NPAGE, "Page down"},
6809 {'b', "Set breakpoint on selected source/disassembly line"},
6810 {'c', "Continue process"},
6811 {'D', "Detach with process suspended"},
6812 {'h', "Show help dialog"},
6813 {'n', "Step over (source line)"},
6814 {'N', "Step over (single instruction)"},
6815 {'f', "Step out (finish)"},
6816 {'s', "Step in (source line)"},
6817 {'S', "Step in (single instruction)"},
6818 {'u', "Frame up"},
6819 {'d', "Frame down"},
6820 {',', "Page up"},
6821 {'.', "Page down"},
6822 {'\0', nullptr}};
6823 return g_source_view_key_help;
6824 }
6825
6826 bool WindowDelegateDraw(Window &window, bool force) override {
6827 ExecutionContext exe_ctx =
6828 m_debugger.GetCommandInterpreter().GetExecutionContext();
6829 Process *process = exe_ctx.GetProcessPtr();
6830 Thread *thread = nullptr;
6831
6832 bool update_location = false;
6833 if (process) {
6834 StateType state = process->GetState();
6835 if (StateIsStoppedState(state, true)) {
6836 // We are stopped, so it is ok to
6837 update_location = true;
6838 }
6839 }
6840
6841 m_min_x = 1;
6842 m_min_y = 2;
6843 m_max_x = window.GetMaxX() - 1;
6844 m_max_y = window.GetMaxY() - 1;
6845
6846 const uint32_t num_visible_lines = NumVisibleLines();
6847 StackFrameSP frame_sp;
6848 bool set_selected_line_to_pc = false;
6849
6850 if (update_location) {
6851 const bool process_alive = process->IsAlive();
6852 bool thread_changed = false;
6853 if (process_alive) {
6854 thread = exe_ctx.GetThreadPtr();
6855 if (thread) {
6856 frame_sp = thread->GetSelectedFrame(SelectMostRelevantFrame);
6857 auto tid = thread->GetID();
6858 thread_changed = tid != m_tid;
6859 m_tid = tid;
6860 } else {
6861 if (m_tid != LLDB_INVALID_THREAD_ID) {
6862 thread_changed = true;
6863 m_tid = LLDB_INVALID_THREAD_ID;
6864 }
6865 }
6866 }
6867 const uint32_t stop_id = process ? process->GetStopID() : 0;
6868 const bool stop_id_changed = stop_id != m_stop_id;
6869 bool frame_changed = false;
6870 m_stop_id = stop_id;
6871 m_title.Clear();
6872 if (frame_sp) {
6873 m_sc = frame_sp->GetSymbolContext(eSymbolContextEverything);
6874 if (m_sc.module_sp) {
6875 m_title.Printf(
6876 "%s", m_sc.module_sp->GetFileSpec().GetFilename().GetCString());
6877 ConstString func_name = m_sc.GetFunctionName();
6878 if (func_name)
6879 m_title.Printf("`%s", func_name.GetCString());
6880 }
6881 const uint32_t frame_idx = frame_sp->GetFrameIndex();
6882 frame_changed = frame_idx != m_frame_idx;
6883 m_frame_idx = frame_idx;
6884 } else {
6885 m_sc.Clear(true);
6886 frame_changed = m_frame_idx != UINT32_MAX;
6887 m_frame_idx = UINT32_MAX;
6888 }
6889
6890 const bool context_changed =
6891 thread_changed || frame_changed || stop_id_changed;
6892
6893 if (process_alive) {
6894 if (m_sc.line_entry.IsValid()) {
6895 m_pc_line = m_sc.line_entry.line;
6896 if (m_pc_line != UINT32_MAX)
6897 --m_pc_line; // Convert to zero based line number...
6898 // Update the selected line if the stop ID changed...
6899 if (context_changed)
6900 m_selected_line = m_pc_line;
6901
6902 if (m_file_sp && m_file_sp->GetSupportFile()->GetSpecOnly() ==
6903 m_sc.line_entry.GetFile()) {
6904 // Same file, nothing to do, we should either have the lines or
6905 // not (source file missing)
6906 if (m_selected_line >= static_cast<size_t>(m_first_visible_line)) {
6907 if (m_selected_line >= m_first_visible_line + num_visible_lines)
6908 m_first_visible_line = m_selected_line - 10;
6909 } else {
6910 if (m_selected_line > 10)
6911 m_first_visible_line = m_selected_line - 10;
6912 else
6913 m_first_visible_line = 0;
6914 }
6915 } else {
6916 // File changed, set selected line to the line with the PC
6917 m_selected_line = m_pc_line;
6918 m_file_sp =
6919 m_debugger.GetSourceManager().GetFile(m_sc.line_entry.file_sp);
6920 if (m_file_sp) {
6921 const size_t num_lines = m_file_sp->GetNumLines();
6922 m_line_width = 1;
6923 for (size_t n = num_lines; n >= 10; n = n / 10)
6924 ++m_line_width;
6925
6926 if (num_lines < num_visible_lines ||
6927 m_selected_line < num_visible_lines)
6928 m_first_visible_line = 0;
6929 else
6930 m_first_visible_line = m_selected_line - 10;
6931 }
6932 }
6933 } else {
6934 m_file_sp.reset();
6935 }
6936
6937 if (!m_file_sp || m_file_sp->GetNumLines() == 0) {
6938 // Show disassembly
6939 bool prefer_file_cache = false;
6940 if (m_sc.function) {
6941 if (m_disassembly_scope != m_sc.function) {
6942 m_disassembly_scope = m_sc.function;
6943 m_disassembly_sp = m_sc.function->GetInstructions(
6944 exe_ctx, nullptr, !prefer_file_cache);
6945 if (m_disassembly_sp)
6946 set_selected_line_to_pc = true;
6947 } else {
6948 set_selected_line_to_pc = context_changed;
6949 }
6950 } else if (m_sc.symbol) {
6951 if (m_disassembly_scope != m_sc.symbol) {
6952 m_disassembly_scope = m_sc.symbol;
6953 m_disassembly_sp = m_sc.symbol->GetInstructions(
6954 exe_ctx, nullptr, prefer_file_cache);
6955 if (m_disassembly_sp)
6956 set_selected_line_to_pc = true;
6957 } else {
6958 set_selected_line_to_pc = context_changed;
6959 }
6960 }
6961 }
6962 } else {
6963 m_pc_line = UINT32_MAX;
6964 }
6965 }
6966
6967 const int window_width = window.GetWidth();
6968 window.Erase();
6969 window.DrawTitleBox("Sources");
6970 if (!m_title.GetString().empty()) {
6971 window.AttributeOn(A_REVERSE);
6972 window.MoveCursor(1, 1);
6973 window.PutChar(' ');
6974 window.PutCStringTruncated(1, m_title.GetString().str().c_str());
6975 int x = window.GetCursorX();
6976 if (x < window_width - 1) {
6977 window.Printf("%*s", window_width - x - 1, "");
6978 }
6979 window.AttributeOff(A_REVERSE);
6980 }
6981
6982 Target *target = exe_ctx.GetTargetPtr();
6983 const size_t num_source_lines = GetNumSourceLines();
6984 if (num_source_lines > 0) {
6985 // Display source
6986 BreakpointLines bp_lines;
6987 if (target) {
6988 BreakpointList &bp_list = target->GetBreakpointList();
6989 const size_t num_bps = bp_list.GetSize();
6990 for (size_t bp_idx = 0; bp_idx < num_bps; ++bp_idx) {
6991 BreakpointSP bp_sp = bp_list.GetBreakpointAtIndex(bp_idx);
6992 const size_t num_bps_locs = bp_sp->GetNumLocations();
6993 for (size_t bp_loc_idx = 0; bp_loc_idx < num_bps_locs; ++bp_loc_idx) {
6994 BreakpointLocationSP bp_loc_sp =
6995 bp_sp->GetLocationAtIndex(bp_loc_idx);
6996 LineEntry bp_loc_line_entry;
6997 if (bp_loc_sp->GetAddress().CalculateSymbolContextLineEntry(
6998 bp_loc_line_entry)) {
6999 if (m_file_sp->GetSupportFile()->GetSpecOnly() ==
7000 bp_loc_line_entry.GetFile()) {
7001 bp_lines.insert(bp_loc_line_entry.line);
7002 }
7003 }
7004 }
7005 }
7006 }
7007
7008 for (size_t i = 0; i < num_visible_lines; ++i) {
7009 const uint32_t curr_line = m_first_visible_line + i;
7010 if (curr_line < num_source_lines) {
7011 const int line_y = m_min_y + i;
7012 window.MoveCursor(1, line_y);
7013 const bool is_pc_line = curr_line == m_pc_line;
7014 const bool line_is_selected = m_selected_line == curr_line;
7015 // Highlight the line as the PC line first (done by passing
7016 // argument to OutputColoredStringTruncated()), then if the selected
7017 // line isn't the same as the PC line, highlight it differently.
7018 attr_t highlight_attr = 0;
7019 attr_t bp_attr = 0;
7020 if (line_is_selected && !is_pc_line)
7021 highlight_attr = A_REVERSE;
7022
7023 if (bp_lines.find(curr_line + 1) != bp_lines.end())
7024 bp_attr = COLOR_PAIR(BlackOnWhite);
7025
7026 if (bp_attr)
7027 window.AttributeOn(bp_attr);
7028
7029 window.Printf(" %*u ", m_line_width, curr_line + 1);
7030
7031 if (bp_attr)
7032 window.AttributeOff(bp_attr);
7033
7034 window.PutChar(ACS_VLINE);
7035 // Mark the line with the PC with a diamond
7036 if (is_pc_line)
7037 window.PutChar(ACS_DIAMOND);
7038 else
7039 window.PutChar(' ');
7040
7041 if (highlight_attr)
7042 window.AttributeOn(highlight_attr);
7043
7044 StreamString lineStream;
7045
7046 std::optional<size_t> column;
7047 if (is_pc_line && m_sc.line_entry.IsValid() && m_sc.line_entry.column)
7048 column = m_sc.line_entry.column - 1;
7049 m_file_sp->DisplaySourceLines(curr_line + 1, column, 0, 0,
7050 &lineStream);
7051 StringRef line = lineStream.GetString();
7052 if (line.ends_with("\n"))
7053 line = line.drop_back();
7054 bool wasWritten = window.OutputColoredStringTruncated(
7055 1, line, m_first_visible_column, is_pc_line);
7056 if (!wasWritten && (line_is_selected || is_pc_line)) {
7057 // Draw an empty space to show the selected/PC line if empty,
7058 // or draw '<' if nothing is visible because of scrolling too much
7059 // to the right.
7060 window.PutCStringTruncated(
7061 1, line.empty() && m_first_visible_column == 0 ? " " : "<");
7062 }
7063
7064 if (is_pc_line && frame_sp &&
7065 frame_sp->GetConcreteFrameIndex() == 0) {
7066 StopInfoSP stop_info_sp;
7067 if (thread)
7068 stop_info_sp = thread->GetStopInfo();
7069 if (stop_info_sp) {
7070 const char *stop_description = stop_info_sp->GetDescription();
7071 if (stop_description && stop_description[0]) {
7072 size_t stop_description_len = strlen(stop_description);
7073 int desc_x = window_width - stop_description_len - 16;
7074 if (desc_x - window.GetCursorX() > 0)
7075 window.Printf("%*s", desc_x - window.GetCursorX(), "");
7076 window.MoveCursor(window_width - stop_description_len - 16,
7077 line_y);
7078 const attr_t stop_reason_attr = COLOR_PAIR(WhiteOnBlue);
7079 window.AttributeOn(stop_reason_attr);
7080 window.PrintfTruncated(1, " <<< Thread %u: %s ",
7081 thread->GetIndexID(), stop_description);
7082 window.AttributeOff(stop_reason_attr);
7083 }
7084 } else {
7085 window.Printf("%*s", window_width - window.GetCursorX() - 1, "");
7086 }
7087 }
7088 if (highlight_attr)
7089 window.AttributeOff(highlight_attr);
7090 } else {
7091 break;
7092 }
7093 }
7094 } else {
7095 size_t num_disassembly_lines = GetNumDisassemblyLines();
7096 if (num_disassembly_lines > 0) {
7097 // Display disassembly
7098 BreakpointAddrs bp_file_addrs;
7099 Target *target = exe_ctx.GetTargetPtr();
7100 if (target) {
7101 BreakpointList &bp_list = target->GetBreakpointList();
7102 const size_t num_bps = bp_list.GetSize();
7103 for (size_t bp_idx = 0; bp_idx < num_bps; ++bp_idx) {
7104 BreakpointSP bp_sp = bp_list.GetBreakpointAtIndex(bp_idx);
7105 const size_t num_bps_locs = bp_sp->GetNumLocations();
7106 for (size_t bp_loc_idx = 0; bp_loc_idx < num_bps_locs;
7107 ++bp_loc_idx) {
7108 BreakpointLocationSP bp_loc_sp =
7109 bp_sp->GetLocationAtIndex(bp_loc_idx);
7110 bp_file_addrs.insert(bp_loc_sp->GetAddress().GetFileAddress());
7111 }
7112 }
7113 }
7114
7115 const attr_t selected_highlight_attr = A_REVERSE;
7116 const attr_t pc_highlight_attr = COLOR_PAIR(WhiteOnBlue);
7117
7118 StreamString strm;
7119
7120 InstructionList &insts = m_disassembly_sp->GetInstructionList();
7121 Address pc_address;
7122
7123 if (frame_sp)
7124 pc_address = frame_sp->GetFrameCodeAddress();
7125 const uint32_t pc_idx =
7126 pc_address.IsValid()
7127 ? insts.GetIndexOfInstructionAtAddress(pc_address)
7128 : UINT32_MAX;
7129 if (set_selected_line_to_pc) {
7130 m_selected_line = pc_idx;
7131 }
7132
7133 const uint32_t non_visible_pc_offset = (num_visible_lines / 5);
7134 if (static_cast<size_t>(m_first_visible_line) >= num_disassembly_lines)
7135 m_first_visible_line = 0;
7136
7137 if (pc_idx < num_disassembly_lines) {
7138 if (pc_idx < static_cast<uint32_t>(m_first_visible_line) ||
7139 pc_idx >= m_first_visible_line + num_visible_lines)
7140 m_first_visible_line = pc_idx - non_visible_pc_offset;
7141 }
7142
7143 for (size_t i = 0; i < num_visible_lines; ++i) {
7144 const uint32_t inst_idx = m_first_visible_line + i;
7145 Instruction *inst = insts.GetInstructionAtIndex(inst_idx).get();
7146 if (!inst)
7147 break;
7148
7149 const int line_y = m_min_y + i;
7150 window.MoveCursor(1, line_y);
7151 const bool is_pc_line = frame_sp && inst_idx == pc_idx;
7152 const bool line_is_selected = m_selected_line == inst_idx;
7153 // Highlight the line as the PC line first, then if the selected
7154 // line isn't the same as the PC line, highlight it differently
7155 attr_t highlight_attr = 0;
7156 attr_t bp_attr = 0;
7157 if (is_pc_line)
7158 highlight_attr = pc_highlight_attr;
7159 else if (line_is_selected)
7160 highlight_attr = selected_highlight_attr;
7161
7162 if (bp_file_addrs.find(inst->GetAddress().GetFileAddress()) !=
7163 bp_file_addrs.end())
7164 bp_attr = COLOR_PAIR(BlackOnWhite);
7165
7166 if (bp_attr)
7167 window.AttributeOn(bp_attr);
7168
7169 window.Printf(" 0x%16.16llx ",
7170 static_cast<unsigned long long>(
7171 inst->GetAddress().GetLoadAddress(target)));
7172
7173 if (bp_attr)
7174 window.AttributeOff(bp_attr);
7175
7176 window.PutChar(ACS_VLINE);
7177 // Mark the line with the PC with a diamond
7178 if (is_pc_line)
7179 window.PutChar(ACS_DIAMOND);
7180 else
7181 window.PutChar(' ');
7182
7183 if (highlight_attr)
7184 window.AttributeOn(highlight_attr);
7185
7186 const char *mnemonic = inst->GetMnemonic(&exe_ctx);
7187 const char *operands = inst->GetOperands(&exe_ctx);
7188 const char *comment = inst->GetComment(&exe_ctx);
7189
7190 if (mnemonic != nullptr && mnemonic[0] == '\0')
7191 mnemonic = nullptr;
7192 if (operands != nullptr && operands[0] == '\0')
7193 operands = nullptr;
7194 if (comment != nullptr && comment[0] == '\0')
7195 comment = nullptr;
7196
7197 strm.Clear();
7198
7199 if (mnemonic != nullptr && operands != nullptr && comment != nullptr)
7200 strm.Printf("%-8s %-25s ; %s", mnemonic, operands, comment);
7201 else if (mnemonic != nullptr && operands != nullptr)
7202 strm.Printf("%-8s %s", mnemonic, operands);
7203 else if (mnemonic != nullptr)
7204 strm.Printf("%s", mnemonic);
7205
7206 int right_pad = 1;
7207 window.PutCStringTruncated(
7208 right_pad,
7209 strm.GetString().substr(m_first_visible_column).data());
7210
7211 if (is_pc_line && frame_sp &&
7212 frame_sp->GetConcreteFrameIndex() == 0) {
7213 StopInfoSP stop_info_sp;
7214 if (thread)
7215 stop_info_sp = thread->GetStopInfo();
7216 if (stop_info_sp) {
7217 const char *stop_description = stop_info_sp->GetDescription();
7218 if (stop_description && stop_description[0]) {
7219 size_t stop_description_len = strlen(stop_description);
7220 int desc_x = window_width - stop_description_len - 16;
7221 if (desc_x - window.GetCursorX() > 0)
7222 window.Printf("%*s", desc_x - window.GetCursorX(), "");
7223 window.MoveCursor(window_width - stop_description_len - 15,
7224 line_y);
7225 if (thread)
7226 window.PrintfTruncated(1, "<<< Thread %u: %s ",
7227 thread->GetIndexID(),
7228 stop_description);
7229 }
7230 } else {
7231 window.Printf("%*s", window_width - window.GetCursorX() - 1, "");
7232 }
7233 }
7234 if (highlight_attr)
7235 window.AttributeOff(highlight_attr);
7236 }
7237 }
7238 }
7239 return true; // Drawing handled
7240 }
7241
7242 size_t GetNumLines() {
7243 size_t num_lines = GetNumSourceLines();
7244 if (num_lines == 0)
7245 num_lines = GetNumDisassemblyLines();
7246 return num_lines;
7247 }
7248
7249 size_t GetNumSourceLines() const {
7250 if (m_file_sp)
7251 return m_file_sp->GetNumLines();
7252 return 0;
7253 }
7254
7255 size_t GetNumDisassemblyLines() const {
7256 if (m_disassembly_sp)
7257 return m_disassembly_sp->GetInstructionList().GetSize();
7258 return 0;
7259 }
7260
7261 HandleCharResult WindowDelegateHandleChar(Window &window, int c) override {
7262 const uint32_t num_visible_lines = NumVisibleLines();
7263 const size_t num_lines = GetNumLines();
7264
7265 switch (c) {
7266 case ',':
7267 case KEY_PPAGE:
7268 // Page up key
7269 if (static_cast<uint32_t>(m_first_visible_line) > num_visible_lines)
7270 m_first_visible_line -= num_visible_lines;
7271 else
7272 m_first_visible_line = 0;
7273 m_selected_line = m_first_visible_line;
7274 return eKeyHandled;
7275
7276 case '.':
7277 case KEY_NPAGE:
7278 // Page down key
7279 {
7280 if (m_first_visible_line + num_visible_lines < num_lines)
7281 m_first_visible_line += num_visible_lines;
7282 else if (num_lines < num_visible_lines)
7283 m_first_visible_line = 0;
7284 else
7285 m_first_visible_line = num_lines - num_visible_lines;
7286 m_selected_line = m_first_visible_line;
7287 }
7288 return eKeyHandled;
7289
7290 case KEY_UP:
7291 if (m_selected_line > 0) {
7292 m_selected_line--;
7293 if (static_cast<size_t>(m_first_visible_line) > m_selected_line)
7294 m_first_visible_line = m_selected_line;
7295 }
7296 return eKeyHandled;
7297
7298 case KEY_DOWN:
7299 if (m_selected_line + 1 < num_lines) {
7300 m_selected_line++;
7301 if (m_first_visible_line + num_visible_lines < m_selected_line)
7302 m_first_visible_line++;
7303 }
7304 return eKeyHandled;
7305
7306 case KEY_LEFT:
7307 if (m_first_visible_column > 0)
7308 --m_first_visible_column;
7309 return eKeyHandled;
7310
7311 case KEY_RIGHT:
7312 ++m_first_visible_column;
7313 return eKeyHandled;
7314
7315 case '\r':
7316 case '\n':
7317 case KEY_ENTER:
7318 // Set a breakpoint and run to the line using a one shot breakpoint
7319 if (GetNumSourceLines() > 0) {
7320 ExecutionContext exe_ctx =
7321 m_debugger.GetCommandInterpreter().GetExecutionContext();
7322 if (exe_ctx.HasProcessScope() && exe_ctx.GetProcessRef().IsAlive()) {
7323 BreakpointSP bp_sp = exe_ctx.GetTargetRef().CreateBreakpoint(
7324 nullptr, // Don't limit the breakpoint to certain modules
7325 m_file_sp->GetSupportFile()->GetSpecOnly(), // Source file
7326 m_selected_line +
7327 1, // Source line number (m_selected_line is zero based)
7328 0, // Unspecified column.
7329 0, // No offset
7330 eLazyBoolCalculate, // Check inlines using global setting
7331 eLazyBoolCalculate, // Skip prologue using global setting,
7332 false, // internal
7333 false, // request_hardware
7334 eLazyBoolCalculate); // move_to_nearest_code
7335 // Make breakpoint one shot
7336 bp_sp->GetOptions().SetOneShot(true);
7337 exe_ctx.GetProcessRef().Resume();
7338 }
7339 } else if (m_selected_line < GetNumDisassemblyLines()) {
7340 const Instruction *inst = m_disassembly_sp->GetInstructionList()
7341 .GetInstructionAtIndex(m_selected_line)
7342 .get();
7343 ExecutionContext exe_ctx =
7344 m_debugger.GetCommandInterpreter().GetExecutionContext();
7345 if (exe_ctx.HasTargetScope()) {
7346 Address addr = inst->GetAddress();
7347 BreakpointSP bp_sp = exe_ctx.GetTargetRef().CreateBreakpoint(
7348 addr, // lldb_private::Address
7349 false, // internal
7350 false); // request_hardware
7351 // Make breakpoint one shot
7352 bp_sp->GetOptions().SetOneShot(true);
7353 exe_ctx.GetProcessRef().Resume();
7354 }
7355 }
7356 return eKeyHandled;
7357
7358 case 'b': // 'b' == toggle breakpoint on currently selected line
7359 ToggleBreakpointOnSelectedLine();
7360 return eKeyHandled;
7361
7362 case 'D': // 'D' == detach and keep stopped
7363 {
7364 ExecutionContext exe_ctx =
7365 m_debugger.GetCommandInterpreter().GetExecutionContext();
7366 if (exe_ctx.HasProcessScope())
7367 exe_ctx.GetProcessRef().Detach(true);
7368 }
7369 return eKeyHandled;
7370
7371 case 'c':
7372 // 'c' == continue
7373 {
7374 ExecutionContext exe_ctx =
7375 m_debugger.GetCommandInterpreter().GetExecutionContext();
7376 if (exe_ctx.HasProcessScope())
7377 exe_ctx.GetProcessRef().Resume();
7378 }
7379 return eKeyHandled;
7380
7381 case 'f':
7382 // 'f' == step out (finish)
7383 {
7384 ExecutionContext exe_ctx =
7385 m_debugger.GetCommandInterpreter().GetExecutionContext();
7386 if (exe_ctx.HasThreadScope() &&
7387 StateIsStoppedState(exe_ctx.GetProcessRef().GetState(), true)) {
7388 Thread *thread = exe_ctx.GetThreadPtr();
7389 uint32_t frame_idx =
7390 thread->GetSelectedFrameIndex(SelectMostRelevantFrame);
7391 exe_ctx.GetThreadRef().StepOut(frame_idx);
7392 }
7393 }
7394 return eKeyHandled;
7395
7396 case 'n': // 'n' == step over
7397 case 'N': // 'N' == step over instruction
7398 {
7399 ExecutionContext exe_ctx =
7400 m_debugger.GetCommandInterpreter().GetExecutionContext();
7401 if (exe_ctx.HasThreadScope() &&
7402 StateIsStoppedState(exe_ctx.GetProcessRef().GetState(), true)) {
7403 bool source_step = (c == 'n');
7404 exe_ctx.GetThreadRef().StepOver(source_step);
7405 }
7406 }
7407 return eKeyHandled;
7408
7409 case 's': // 's' == step into
7410 case 'S': // 'S' == step into instruction
7411 {
7412 ExecutionContext exe_ctx =
7413 m_debugger.GetCommandInterpreter().GetExecutionContext();
7414 if (exe_ctx.HasThreadScope() &&
7415 StateIsStoppedState(exe_ctx.GetProcessRef().GetState(), true)) {
7416 bool source_step = (c == 's');
7417 exe_ctx.GetThreadRef().StepIn(source_step);
7418 }
7419 }
7420 return eKeyHandled;
7421
7422 case 'u': // 'u' == frame up
7423 case 'd': // 'd' == frame down
7424 {
7425 ExecutionContext exe_ctx =
7426 m_debugger.GetCommandInterpreter().GetExecutionContext();
7427 if (exe_ctx.HasThreadScope()) {
7428 Thread *thread = exe_ctx.GetThreadPtr();
7429 uint32_t frame_idx =
7430 thread->GetSelectedFrameIndex(SelectMostRelevantFrame);
7431 if (frame_idx == UINT32_MAX)
7432 frame_idx = 0;
7433 if (c == 'u' && frame_idx + 1 < thread->GetStackFrameCount())
7434 ++frame_idx;
7435 else if (c == 'd' && frame_idx > 0)
7436 --frame_idx;
7437 if (thread->SetSelectedFrameByIndex(frame_idx, true))
7438 exe_ctx.SetFrameSP(thread->GetSelectedFrame(SelectMostRelevantFrame));
7439 }
7440 }
7441 return eKeyHandled;
7442
7443 case 'h':
7444 window.CreateHelpSubwindow();
7445 return eKeyHandled;
7446
7447 default:
7448 break;
7449 }
7450 return eKeyNotHandled;
7451 }
7452
7453 void ToggleBreakpointOnSelectedLine() {
7454 ExecutionContext exe_ctx =
7455 m_debugger.GetCommandInterpreter().GetExecutionContext();
7456 if (!exe_ctx.HasTargetScope())
7457 return;
7458 if (GetNumSourceLines() > 0) {
7459 // Source file breakpoint.
7460 BreakpointList &bp_list = exe_ctx.GetTargetRef().GetBreakpointList();
7461 const size_t num_bps = bp_list.GetSize();
7462 for (size_t bp_idx = 0; bp_idx < num_bps; ++bp_idx) {
7463 BreakpointSP bp_sp = bp_list.GetBreakpointAtIndex(bp_idx);
7464 const size_t num_bps_locs = bp_sp->GetNumLocations();
7465 for (size_t bp_loc_idx = 0; bp_loc_idx < num_bps_locs; ++bp_loc_idx) {
7466 BreakpointLocationSP bp_loc_sp =
7467 bp_sp->GetLocationAtIndex(bp_loc_idx);
7468 LineEntry bp_loc_line_entry;
7469 if (bp_loc_sp->GetAddress().CalculateSymbolContextLineEntry(
7470 bp_loc_line_entry)) {
7471 if (m_file_sp->GetSupportFile()->GetSpecOnly() ==
7472 bp_loc_line_entry.GetFile() &&
7473 m_selected_line + 1 == bp_loc_line_entry.line) {
7474 bool removed =
7475 exe_ctx.GetTargetRef().RemoveBreakpointByID(bp_sp->GetID());
7476 assert(removed);
7477 UNUSED_IF_ASSERT_DISABLED(removed);
7478 return; // Existing breakpoint removed.
7479 }
7480 }
7481 }
7482 }
7483 // No breakpoint found on the location, add it.
7484 BreakpointSP bp_sp = exe_ctx.GetTargetRef().CreateBreakpoint(
7485 nullptr, // Don't limit the breakpoint to certain modules
7486 m_file_sp->GetSupportFile()->GetSpecOnly(), // Source file
7487 m_selected_line +
7488 1, // Source line number (m_selected_line is zero based)
7489 0, // No column specified.
7490 0, // No offset
7491 eLazyBoolCalculate, // Check inlines using global setting
7492 eLazyBoolCalculate, // Skip prologue using global setting,
7493 false, // internal
7494 false, // request_hardware
7495 eLazyBoolCalculate); // move_to_nearest_code
7496 } else {
7497 // Disassembly breakpoint.
7498 assert(GetNumDisassemblyLines() > 0);
7499 assert(m_selected_line < GetNumDisassemblyLines());
7500 const Instruction *inst = m_disassembly_sp->GetInstructionList()
7501 .GetInstructionAtIndex(m_selected_line)
7502 .get();
7503 Address addr = inst->GetAddress();
7504 // Try to find it.
7505 BreakpointList &bp_list = exe_ctx.GetTargetRef().GetBreakpointList();
7506 const size_t num_bps = bp_list.GetSize();
7507 for (size_t bp_idx = 0; bp_idx < num_bps; ++bp_idx) {
7508 BreakpointSP bp_sp = bp_list.GetBreakpointAtIndex(bp_idx);
7509 const size_t num_bps_locs = bp_sp->GetNumLocations();
7510 for (size_t bp_loc_idx = 0; bp_loc_idx < num_bps_locs; ++bp_loc_idx) {
7511 BreakpointLocationSP bp_loc_sp =
7512 bp_sp->GetLocationAtIndex(bp_loc_idx);
7513 LineEntry bp_loc_line_entry;
7514 const lldb::addr_t file_addr =
7515 bp_loc_sp->GetAddress().GetFileAddress();
7516 if (file_addr == addr.GetFileAddress()) {
7517 bool removed =
7518 exe_ctx.GetTargetRef().RemoveBreakpointByID(bp_sp->GetID());
7519 assert(removed);
7520 UNUSED_IF_ASSERT_DISABLED(removed);
7521 return; // Existing breakpoint removed.
7522 }
7523 }
7524 }
7525 // No breakpoint found on the address, add it.
7526 BreakpointSP bp_sp =
7527 exe_ctx.GetTargetRef().CreateBreakpoint(addr, // lldb_private::Address
7528 false, // internal
7529 false); // request_hardware
7530 }
7531 }
7532
7533protected:
7534 typedef std::set<uint32_t> BreakpointLines;
7535 typedef std::set<lldb::addr_t> BreakpointAddrs;
7536
7537 Debugger &m_debugger;
7538 SymbolContext m_sc;
7539 SourceManager::FileSP m_file_sp;
7540 SymbolContextScope *m_disassembly_scope = nullptr;
7541 lldb::DisassemblerSP m_disassembly_sp;
7542 StreamString m_title;
7543 lldb::user_id_t m_tid = LLDB_INVALID_THREAD_ID;
7544 int m_line_width = 4;
7545 uint32_t m_selected_line = 0; // The selected line
7546 uint32_t m_pc_line = 0; // The line with the PC
7547 uint32_t m_stop_id = 0;
7548 uint32_t m_frame_idx = UINT32_MAX;
7549 int m_first_visible_line = 0;
7550 int m_first_visible_column = 0;
7551 int m_min_x = 0;
7552 int m_min_y = 0;
7553 int m_max_x = 0;
7554 int m_max_y = 0;
7555};
7556
7557DisplayOptions ValueObjectListDelegate::g_options = {true};
7558
7559IOHandlerCursesGUI::IOHandlerCursesGUI(Debugger &debugger)
7560 : IOHandler(debugger, IOHandler::Type::Curses) {}
7561
7562void IOHandlerCursesGUI::Activate() {
7563 IOHandler::Activate();
7564 if (!m_app_up) {
7565 m_app_up = std::make_unique<Application>(
7566 m_input_sp ? m_input_sp->GetStream() : nullptr,
7567 m_output_sp ? m_input_sp->GetStream() : nullptr);
7568
7569 // This is both a window and a menu delegate
7570 std::shared_ptr<ApplicationDelegate> app_delegate_sp(
7571 new ApplicationDelegate(*m_app_up, m_debugger));
7572
7573 MenuDelegateSP app_menu_delegate_sp =
7574 std::static_pointer_cast<MenuDelegate>(app_delegate_sp);
7575 MenuSP lldb_menu_sp(
7576 new Menu("LLDB", "F1", KEY_F(1), ApplicationDelegate::eMenuID_LLDB));
7577 MenuSP exit_menuitem_sp(
7578 new Menu("Exit", nullptr, 'x', ApplicationDelegate::eMenuID_LLDBExit));
7579 exit_menuitem_sp->SetCannedResult(MenuActionResult::Quit);
7580 lldb_menu_sp->AddSubmenu(std::make_shared<Menu>(
7581 "About LLDB", nullptr, 'a', ApplicationDelegate::eMenuID_LLDBAbout));
7582 lldb_menu_sp->AddSubmenu(std::make_shared<Menu>(Menu::Type::Separator));
7583 lldb_menu_sp->AddSubmenu(exit_menuitem_sp);
7584
7585 MenuSP target_menu_sp(new Menu("Target", "F2", KEY_F(2),
7586 ApplicationDelegate::eMenuID_Target));
7587 target_menu_sp->AddSubmenu(std::make_shared<Menu>(
7588 "Create", nullptr, 'c', ApplicationDelegate::eMenuID_TargetCreate));
7589 target_menu_sp->AddSubmenu(std::make_shared<Menu>(
7590 "Delete", nullptr, 'd', ApplicationDelegate::eMenuID_TargetDelete));
7591
