7592 MenuSP process_menu_sp(new Menu("Process", "F3", KEY_F(3),
7593 ApplicationDelegate::eMenuID_Process));
7594 process_menu_sp->AddSubmenu(std::make_shared<Menu>(
7595 "Attach", nullptr, 'a', ApplicationDelegate::eMenuID_ProcessAttach));
7596 process_menu_sp->AddSubmenu(std::make_shared<Menu>(
7597 "Detach and resume", nullptr, 'd',
7598 ApplicationDelegate::eMenuID_ProcessDetachResume));
7599 process_menu_sp->AddSubmenu(std::make_shared<Menu>(
7600 "Detach suspended", nullptr, 's',
7601 ApplicationDelegate::eMenuID_ProcessDetachSuspended));
7602 process_menu_sp->AddSubmenu(std::make_shared<Menu>(
7603 "Launch", nullptr, 'l', ApplicationDelegate::eMenuID_ProcessLaunch));
7604 process_menu_sp->AddSubmenu(std::make_shared<Menu>(Menu::Type::Separator));
7605 process_menu_sp->AddSubmenu(
7606 std::make_shared<Menu>("Continue", nullptr, 'c',
7607 ApplicationDelegate::eMenuID_ProcessContinue));
7608 process_menu_sp->AddSubmenu(std::make_shared<Menu>(
7609 "Halt", nullptr, 'h', ApplicationDelegate::eMenuID_ProcessHalt));
7610 process_menu_sp->AddSubmenu(std::make_shared<Menu>(
7611 "Kill", nullptr, 'k', ApplicationDelegate::eMenuID_ProcessKill));
7612
7613 MenuSP thread_menu_sp(new Menu("Thread", "F4", KEY_F(4),
7614 ApplicationDelegate::eMenuID_Thread));
7615 thread_menu_sp->AddSubmenu(std::make_shared<Menu>(
7616 "Step In", nullptr, 'i', ApplicationDelegate::eMenuID_ThreadStepIn));
7617 thread_menu_sp->AddSubmenu(
7618 std::make_shared<Menu>("Step Over", nullptr, 'v',
7619 ApplicationDelegate::eMenuID_ThreadStepOver));
7620 thread_menu_sp->AddSubmenu(std::make_shared<Menu>(
7621 "Step Out", nullptr, 'o', ApplicationDelegate::eMenuID_ThreadStepOut));
7622
7623 MenuSP view_menu_sp(
7624 new Menu("View", "F5", KEY_F(5), ApplicationDelegate::eMenuID_View));
7625 view_menu_sp->AddSubmenu(std::make_shared<Menu>(
7626 "Backtrace", nullptr, 't', ApplicationDelegate::eMenuID_ViewBacktrace));
7627 view_menu_sp->AddSubmenu(std::make_shared<Menu>(
7628 "Registers", nullptr, 'r', ApplicationDelegate::eMenuID_ViewRegisters));
7629 view_menu_sp->AddSubmenu(std::make_shared<Menu>(
7630 "Source", nullptr, 's', ApplicationDelegate::eMenuID_ViewSource));
7631 view_menu_sp->AddSubmenu(std::make_shared<Menu>(
7632 "Variables", nullptr, 'v', ApplicationDelegate::eMenuID_ViewVariables));
7633 view_menu_sp->AddSubmenu(
7634 std::make_shared<Menu>("Breakpoints", nullptr, 'b',
7635 ApplicationDelegate::eMenuID_ViewBreakpoints));
7636
7637 MenuSP help_menu_sp(
7638 new Menu("Help", "F6", KEY_F(6), ApplicationDelegate::eMenuID_Help));
7639 help_menu_sp->AddSubmenu(std::make_shared<Menu>(
7640 "GUI Help", nullptr, 'g', ApplicationDelegate::eMenuID_HelpGUIHelp));
7641
7642 m_app_up->Initialize();
7643 WindowSP &main_window_sp = m_app_up->GetMainWindow();
7644
7645 MenuSP menubar_sp(new Menu(Menu::Type::Bar));
7646 menubar_sp->AddSubmenu(lldb_menu_sp);
7647 menubar_sp->AddSubmenu(target_menu_sp);
7648 menubar_sp->AddSubmenu(process_menu_sp);
7649 menubar_sp->AddSubmenu(thread_menu_sp);
7650 menubar_sp->AddSubmenu(view_menu_sp);
7651 menubar_sp->AddSubmenu(help_menu_sp);
7652 menubar_sp->SetDelegate(app_menu_delegate_sp);
7653
7654 Rect content_bounds = main_window_sp->GetFrame();
7655 Rect menubar_bounds = content_bounds.MakeMenuBar();
7656 Rect status_bounds = content_bounds.MakeStatusBar();
7657 Rect source_bounds;
7658 Rect variables_bounds;
7659 Rect threads_bounds;
7660 Rect source_variables_bounds;
7661 content_bounds.VerticalSplitPercentage(0.80, source_variables_bounds,
7662 threads_bounds);
7663 source_variables_bounds.HorizontalSplitPercentage(0.70, source_bounds,
7664 variables_bounds);
7665
7666 WindowSP menubar_window_sp =
7667 main_window_sp->CreateSubWindow("Menubar", menubar_bounds, false);
7668 // Let the menubar get keys if the active window doesn't handle the keys
7669 // that are typed so it can respond to menubar key presses.
7670 menubar_window_sp->SetCanBeActive(
7671 false); // Don't let the menubar become the active window
7672 menubar_window_sp->SetDelegate(menubar_sp);
7673
7674 WindowSP source_window_sp(
7675 main_window_sp->CreateSubWindow("Source", source_bounds, true));
7676 WindowSP variables_window_sp(
7677 main_window_sp->CreateSubWindow("Variables", variables_bounds, false));
7678 WindowSP threads_window_sp(
7679 main_window_sp->CreateSubWindow("Threads", threads_bounds, false));
7680 WindowSP status_window_sp(
7681 main_window_sp->CreateSubWindow("Status", status_bounds, false));
7682 status_window_sp->SetCanBeActive(
7683 false); // Don't let the status bar become the active window
7684 main_window_sp->SetDelegate(
7685 std::static_pointer_cast<WindowDelegate>(app_delegate_sp));
7686 source_window_sp->SetDelegate(
7687 WindowDelegateSP(new SourceFileWindowDelegate(m_debugger)));
7688 variables_window_sp->SetDelegate(
7689 WindowDelegateSP(new FrameVariablesWindowDelegate(m_debugger)));
7690 TreeDelegateSP thread_delegate_sp(new ThreadsTreeDelegate(m_debugger));
7691 threads_window_sp->SetDelegate(WindowDelegateSP(
7692 new TreeWindowDelegate(m_debugger, thread_delegate_sp)));
7693 status_window_sp->SetDelegate(
7694 WindowDelegateSP(new StatusBarWindowDelegate(m_debugger)));
7695
7696 // All colors with black background.
7697 init_pair(1, COLOR_BLACK, COLOR_BLACK);
7698 init_pair(2, COLOR_RED, COLOR_BLACK);
7699 init_pair(3, COLOR_GREEN, COLOR_BLACK);
7700 init_pair(4, COLOR_YELLOW, COLOR_BLACK);
7701 init_pair(5, COLOR_BLUE, COLOR_BLACK);
7702 init_pair(6, COLOR_MAGENTA, COLOR_BLACK);
7703 init_pair(7, COLOR_CYAN, COLOR_BLACK);
7704 init_pair(8, COLOR_WHITE, COLOR_BLACK);
7705 // All colors with blue background.
7706 init_pair(9, COLOR_BLACK, COLOR_BLUE);
7707 init_pair(10, COLOR_RED, COLOR_BLUE);
7708 init_pair(11, COLOR_GREEN, COLOR_BLUE);
7709 init_pair(12, COLOR_YELLOW, COLOR_BLUE);
7710 init_pair(13, COLOR_BLUE, COLOR_BLUE);
7711 init_pair(14, COLOR_MAGENTA, COLOR_BLUE);
7712 init_pair(15, COLOR_CYAN, COLOR_BLUE);
7713 init_pair(16, COLOR_WHITE, COLOR_BLUE);
7714 // These must match the order in the color indexes enum.
7715 init_pair(17, COLOR_BLACK, COLOR_WHITE);
7716 init_pair(18, COLOR_MAGENTA, COLOR_WHITE);
7717 static_assert(LastColorPairIndex == 18, "Color indexes do not match.");
7718
7719 define_key("\033[Z", KEY_SHIFT_TAB);
7720 define_key("\033\015", KEY_ALT_ENTER);
7721 }
7722}
7723
7724void IOHandlerCursesGUI::Deactivate() { m_app_up->Terminate(); }
7725
7726void IOHandlerCursesGUI::Run() {
7727 m_app_up->Run(m_debugger);
7728 SetIsDone(true);
7729}
7730
7731IOHandlerCursesGUI::~IOHandlerCursesGUI() = default;
7732
7733void IOHandlerCursesGUI::Cancel() {}
7734
7735bool IOHandlerCursesGUI::Interrupt() {
7736 return m_debugger.GetCommandInterpreter().IOHandlerInterrupt(*this);
7737}
7738
7739void IOHandlerCursesGUI::GotEOF() {}
7740
7741void IOHandlerCursesGUI::TerminalSizeChanged() {
7742 m_app_up->TerminalSizeChanged();
7743}
7744
7745#endif // LLDB_ENABLE_CURSES
